title: Arkitekt Inbyggda system SW
description:
Tech Lead / Software Architect – Embedded Systems | Karlskoga
  
Vi söker en erfaren Tech Lead / Software Architect inom Embedded Systems för ett långsiktigt konsultuppdrag hos vår kund i Karlskoga. Här får du möjlighet att arbeta i en högteknologisk miljö där du spelar en nyckelroll i utvecklingen av avancerade inbyggda system och framtidens tekniska lösningar.
  
Om rollen
  
I rollen som Tech Lead / Software Architect kommer du att kombinera strategiskt arkitekturarbete med praktisk utveckling. Du ansvarar för att definiera tekniska lösningar, fatta arkitekturella beslut och vägleda utvecklingsteam genom hela utvecklingsprocessen – från design till implementation och kvalitetssäkring.
  
Du blir en viktig teknisk rådgivare och arbetar nära utvecklare, systemingenjörer och andra intressenter för att säkerställa robusta, skalbara och långsiktigt hållbara lösningar.
  
Vi söker dig som har
  
Minst 5 års erfarenhet av utveckling inom inbyggda system
  
Mycket goda kunskaper i C/C++
  
Erfarenhet av Embedded Linux, FreeRTOS eller liknande operativsystem
  
Erfarenhet av CMake och/eller Make
  
God förståelse för kommunikationsprotokoll såsom I2C, SPI och UART
  
Erfarenhet av arbete med mikrokontrollers
  
Erfarenhet av utveckling av device drivers
  
Erfarenhet av enhetstestning och kvalitetssäkring
  
Erfarenhet av agila utvecklingsmetoder
  
Erfarenhet av System on Modules (SoM)
  
Erfarenhet av DevOps-principer och arbetssätt
  
  

Meriterande erfarenheter
  
Yocto
  
Arbete med elscheman och hårdvarunära utveckling
  
  

Uppdragsinformation
  
**Roll:** Tech Lead / Software Architect
  
**Plats:** Karlskoga
  
**Arbetsform:** På plats hos kund
  
**Uppdragslängd:** 12 månader
  
**Start:** Enligt överenskommelse
  
**Förlängning:** Möjlighet till förlängning
  
**Säkerhetsprövning:** Genomförs före uppdragsstart
  
Varför detta uppdrag?
  
Detta är en möjlighet för dig som vill ta ett tekniskt ledarskap i utvecklingen av avancerade inbyggda system och arbeta i en miljö där teknik, innovation och kvalitet står i fokus. Du får stor påverkan på både arkitektur och tekniska vägval samtidigt som du arbetar

title: Sales Specialist
description:
**Introduction to Eficode**  

We’re building the future of software development - driving innovation across Cloud, DevOps, Agile, Service Management, and AI-powered transformation. Our mission is to help organizations evolve into truly software-driven enterprises, empowering them to deliver faster, smarter, and more sustainably through modern technology and intelligent automation.


At Eficode, we help some of the world’s leading organisations modernise the way they build software by combining DevOps culture, platform engineering, AI-assisted software development, and cloud-native tooling. From intelligent automation to agentic workflows and AI-enhanced SDLC (Software Development Life Cycle) practices, we are at the forefront of helping teams transform how software is delivered.


As an Atlassian Platinum Solution Partner, we have been recognised multiple times as Atlassian Partner of the Year, most recently for Software Solutions, 2026. We are also proud to be a two-time GitHub Partner of the Year in EMEA, a GitLab Select Partner, and an Azure Managed Service Provider.


With over 600 experts across 10 countries, we bring together leading talent from the Nordics, continental Europe, the UK, and the Americas.

**Role purpose**


As a Sales Specialist at Eficode, you will play a key role in driving growth across our strategic solution areas by combining strong commercial acumen with a solid understanding of modern technology ecosystems.


You’ll work closely with regional sales teams, solution consultants, marketing, and delivery teams to identify and close new business opportunities, helping customers understand how Eficode’s services and solutions can support their transformation journeys.


This role is ideal for someone who thrives in fast-paced sales environments, enjoys building relationships and creating opportunities, and is excited by the evolving world of Cloud, DevOps, AI-powered software development, and modern enterprise tooling.

**Role responsibilities**  

Your main responsibilities as our Sales Specialist will include (but won’t be limited to):

* Owning and achieving individual sales quotas across designated solution areas, including both shadow quotas and full quotas for new business opportunities
* Working closely with regional account managers and marketing teams to identify, qualify, and close strategic opportunities
* Developing and maintaining strong relationships with strategic technology partners and vendors, identifying joint go-to-market opportunities and leveraging partner ecosystems to drive pipeline growth
* Building tailored customer proposals, presentations, and solution positioning aligned to customer needs and business goals
* Acting as a trusted advisor and subject matter expert across assigned solution areas
* Collaborating with pre-sales and delivery teams to scope, position, and package offerings that balance customer value with commercial success
* Maintaining accurate pipeline management and forecasting within CRM systems
* Driving pipeline growth and supporting cross-sell and upsell opportunities across the Eficode portfolio
* Representing Eficode at customer meetings, events, webinars, and industry engagements as a solution evangelist
* Building and maintaining strong relationships across customer and partner networks

 **Role Requirements**  

You will make a great match for this role if you have:

* Previous experience working within B2B SaaS sales, IT consulting sales, or enterprise software licensing environments
* Experience selling cloud, SaaS, or consumption-based licensing solutions
* A strong hunter mentality, with experience generating and closing new business opportunities
* Experience working with enterprise customers and navigating complex sales cycles
* A solid understanding of modern software development ecosystems, cloud platforms, or DevOps-related technologies
* Excellent communication and relationship-building skills in English
* A proactive, commercially driven, and collaborative mindset
* The ability to work cross-functionally with sales, technical, marketing, and delivery teams
* An established professional network within relevant markets or industries

 **Nice to have’s:**  

It would be an added bonus if you have:

* Experience working with Atlassian, GitHub, GitLab, AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, or DevOps toolchains
* Experience selling or working with large enterprise platforms such as ServiceNow, Salesforce, or Workday
* Previous experience working in consultancy or partner-led sales environments
* Knowledge of AI-powered software development, cloud transformation, or platform engineering concepts
* Swedish or Danish language skills for customer-facing work would be beneficial

 **Location & Setup**

* You’ll work in a hybrid setup, with remote working flexibility while also having access to our Scandinavian offices for collaboration and team connection.
* Occasional travel across Scandinavia to Eficode offices and customer sites is part of the role
* This is a full-time position with typical office hours and flexibility where needed
* The role reports to the Head of Account Management Scandinavia
* Possible locations: Stockholm,, Malmö, or Copenhagen
* Compensation includes a market-based salary with a commission plan (OTE model)

 **How to Apply**


If this sounds like the right opportunity for you, we’d love to hear from you - apply today!


A member of our Talent Acquisition team will review your application and, if your profile is a match, will be in contact to organise an initial screening call. If you are not selected to move forward in the process, we will also make sure to keep you informed.

 **What’s in it for you?**


Eficode offer a range of perks and benefits for employees, including:

* Generous paid holiday
* Health insurance & pension scheme
* Learning & development - We have knowledge sharing sessions, team activities, technical and soft skills trainings to all Eficodeans in our Academy.
* Regular social events, lunches and code camps
* A work laptop, phone and necessary work equipment

  

To find out more about life at Eficode, and hear what our people think about us, click here.

**Application process**  

If this role sounds like a good fit, we encourage you to apply today. Selected candidates will be invited to an initial screening call with our Talent Acquisition team. The process then includes two interviews, followed by a final informal team coffee - giving you the chance to get to know your future colleagues and experience the team culture firsthand.

**DEI Statement**  

At Eficode we are committed to offering an inclusive recruitment process and equal opportunities for all applicants. We are dedicated to creating a work environment that embraces diversity, inclusion, and respect for all employees. We believe that our differences make us better. We recognise that by having diverse perspectives, skills, ages, genders, backgrounds, and cultures, we will better drive our customers forward and innovate in our field.

  

To ensure a fair recruitment process, please refrain from sharing unnecessary personal information or an image of yourself in your job application.

 **Salary Development**  

At Eficode, we believe your compensation should reflect the impact you make and how you grow along the way. Your salary develops through regular check-ins with your team lead, where we look at things like your skills, experience, client work, feedback, and overall contribution — both to your projects and to our culture. As a consultancy, it’s natural that factors like time spent on billable client work are part of the picture — but so are your development, collaboration, and everyday efforts that drive value. We also carry out a company-wide salary review once a year.


On top of your salary, we offer a broad mix of benefits, both financial and non-financial, to support your well-being, work-life balance, and professional growth.


Find out more about our benefits [here].

**Beware of recruitment scams**


Eficode never asks for payment, bank details, or sensitive personal information during the recruitment process. We only communicate through official Eficode email accounts and approved recruitment platforms. If you receive an unsolicited message, job offer, or request for personal or financial information claiming to be from Eficode, it may be fraudulent.

title: Forward Deployed Engineer
description:
* Ansök senast: 24 juni 2026
* Stockholm
Tänk om vi kunde lägga mindre tid på onödiga manuella steg och krångliga flöden och mer tid på


Tänk om vi kunde lägga mindre tid på onödiga manuella steg och krångliga flöden och mer tid på innovation, lärande och det som verkligen skapar värde.


På SVT bygger vi nu upp en ny automationsförmåga med just det målet. Genom att ta bort tidsödande, repetitiva moment i vårt arbete vill vi frigöra kraft hos både utvecklingsteam och verksamhet. Kraft som kan användas till att utforska nya idéer, lära snabbare och utveckla framtidens public service. Men det finns en klyfta mellan vad AI kan göra och vad organisationer faktiskt lyckas driftsätta. Den klyftan är ditt jobb att stänga. SVT hanterar dagligen enorma mängder ljud, video, text och bild, journalister som behöver sålla bland hundratals tips, arkiv med decennier av rörligt material, redaktioner som behöver faktakolla snabbare än det är möjligt manuellt. Tekniken finns. Det som behövs är någon som kan få den att fungera i vår verklighet, med våra system och våra användare.


SVT har ambitionen att vara det mest innovativa medieföretaget i världen. Automation och AI är inte ett sidospår i den resan, utan en av våra viktigaste möjliggörare för att nå dit. Som Forward Deployed AI Engineer är du en av dem som gör det möjligt.


**Vad vi erbjuder dig:**  

Du kommer att arbeta nära verksamheten, direkt i de flöden och system där tekniken kan leverera värde. Du och teamet äger problemet från discovery till produktion där faktisk effekt är i fokus. Du blir en del av ett tvärfunktionellt team med stort handlingsutrymme, snabb utvecklingstakt och tydligt fokus på mätbara resultat.. Rollen är bred per design: du är del AI-specialist, del ML-ingenjör, del systemutvecklare och del lösningsarkitekt. Det är precis så det ska vara.


**Vem vi tror att du är:**  

Du trivs i gränslandet mellan verksamhet och teknik och har ett arbetssätt där förståelse för behov och sammanhang är en naturlig del av uppdraget. Du uppskattar dialogen med verksamheten och använder den för att omsätta krav och förväntningar till lösningar som fungerar i praktiken. Du är van att arbeta i miljöer där förutsättningarna inte alltid är fullt definierade från början och bidrar till att skapa struktur och riktning över tid. I dina tekniska val utgår du från uppdraget och helheten, snarare än från ett specifikt verktyg.


Vi söker dig som har:


* Praktisk erfarenhet av API-design och integration, inklusive REST, GraphQL, webhooks och event‑driven arkitektur
* Programmeringskunskaper i Python och/eller Node.js för databehandling, transformationer och automationslogik
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med både moderna molntjänster och äldre legacy‑system utan API:er
* Erfarenhet av asynkrona flöden och meddelandeköer
* Förståelse för säkerhet i integrationer, till exempel OAuth2, API‑nycklar, rate limiting och dataskydd
* Vana av CI/CD, testning och DevOps‑kultur där kvalitet är ett gemensamt ansvar
* Erfarenhet av containerisering och Kubernetes i produktionsmiljö
* Byggt och driftsatt AI‑lösningar i produktion och arbetat med konsekvenser som uppstår i verklig användning
* Praktisk erfarenhet av LLM‑API:er, RAG‑pipelines, prompt engineering och agentbaserade arbetsflöden
* Relevant utbildning inom datavetenskap, systemteknik, datalingvistik eller motsvarande. Alternativt en portfölj som bevisar att du inte behöver den

Det är meriterande om:


* Du har erfarenhet av multimodala modeller — speech-to-text, video-analys, bildklassificering, dokumentförståelse. SVT:s innehåll är ljud, bild och text
* Du har erfarenhet eller intresse av att arbeta med säkerhet, informationsklassning och ansvarsfull AI‑användning
* Du har erfarenhet av RPA‑ och automationsverktyg som OpenRPA, UiPath, MS Power Automate eller liknande

**Vad tjänsten innebär:**  

Som Forward Deployed Engineer kommer du att bla:


* Sätta dig in i verksamhetens faktiska problem: inte vad de tror att de behöver, utan vad som faktiskt blockerar dem. Och omsätta det i konkreta AI-lösningar
* Äga hela leveransen — från idé och prototyp till driftsättning och löpande förbättring
* Arbeta nära verksamheten och förstå dess krav på säkerhet, spårbarhet, korrekthet och transparens
* Bygga och förvalta APIer med tydliga kontrakt, versionshantering och dokumentation. Lösningarna ska vara återanvändbara, inte engångslösningar
* Skriva robust backend-kod och bygga flöden för databehandling, transformationer och automationslogik som kräver mer än low-code kan erbjuda.
* Bygga evalueringspipelines och sätta kvalitetsmått för AI-output. I en journalistisk miljö med krav på korrekthet och transparens är evals inte valfritt
* Designa och implementera integrationer mellan SVT:s interna system, som tex publiceringsverktyg, arkiv, rättighetssystem och externa tjänster. Säkerställa att AI-lösningarna faktiskt når användaren i produktion
* Delta i utvärdering av nya modeller och verktyg tillsammans med AI-hubben och övriga utvecklare
* Bidra till teamets gemensamma DevOps-kultur: testning, CI/CD-pipelines, kodgranskning och deployment
* Dela lärdomar med andra, samt både använda och bidra till golden paths inom utvecklar-communityn på SVT

**Hur du ansöker:**  

I den här rekryteringsprocessen använder vi urvalsfrågor och CV, du behöver alltså inte skicka med ett personligt brev. Det gör vi för att säkerställa att rekryteringen blir kompetensbaserad och effektiv. Frågorna handlar om dina erfarenheter och drivkrafter och kan ta en stund att besvara, men de gör att vi får samma viktiga information av alla kandidater. Välkommen med din ansökan senast 9 juni. Intervjuer sker löpande.


För mer information om tjänsten kontakta gruppchef Sorosh Seddigh på sorosh.seddigh@svt.se . Facklig information lämnas av Fanny Lindhé (SACO), Maria Nassikas (Unionen) och Jane Andersson (SJF). Samtliga nås via växeln, tfn 08-784 00 00.


**Annat som är bra att veta:**  

Tjänsten är placerad i Stockholm och i dagsläget har vi upplägget med minst 51 % närvaro på plats. Vi erbjuder en tillsvidareanställning på heltid.


Välkommen med din ansökan!


**Vi har riktigt bra förmåner**
-------------------------------

* Hälsa - Upp till 3500 kr i friskvårdsbidrag
* Semester - Du som fyllt 40 år har tre extra semesterdagar
* Pension - ITP tjänstepension
* Föräldratillägg/föräldralön
* Verktyg - Mobiltelefon för privat bruk (exkl. utlandssamtal)
* Ledighet med bibehållen lön - Permission 1-2 dagar/år vid t.ex. flytt eller begravning
**Om företaget**
----------------

**Vi jobbar för hela bilden**

Från nära till jordens alla hörn. Från förtvivlan till hopp. Från allvar till humor. Vi engagerar, berör och berikar – och gör skillnad på riktigt. Vi drivs av att veta mer och av att komma närmare. Därför går vi på djupet, iakttar, lyssnar nyfiket och låter varje berättelse växa fram. För vi har ett viktigt uppdrag: att skapa ett innehåll som engagerar alla i Sverige.


Allt finns innanför våra väggar, från idé och produktion till distribution. Vi vill vara det kreativa navet som driver branschen framåt och när vi behöver samarbetar vi med de allra bästa. Alla roller är lika viktiga och alla är specialister på sin länk i kedjan som granskar, ljussätter, filmar, iscensätter, roar, formaterar, informerar och inspirerar. Vi behöver ständigt locka till oss talanger som ger oss nya perspektiv. Vill du bli en del av berättelsen?


Vår ambition är att granska och skildra de frågor som är viktiga för dig. SVT verkar i allmänhetens tjänst och drivs självständigt i förhållande till politiska, kommersiella och andra intressen i samhället.


Sorosh Seddigh | Kontaktperson

  


+###### 

Stockholm  



Vid tillsättningar görs en bakgrundskontroll av slutkandidat. Vid en tillsvidareanställning blir du automatiskt krigsplacerad.

title: Senior produktutvecklare Frontend
description:
Vill du bygga produkter som används på riktigt och vara med och påverka både teknik och användarupplevelse? Och vill du vara med på utvecklingsresan från att vara en desktopprodukt till en webbaserad mjukvarulösning, samt utforska hur AI kan vara en del i vårt framtida erbjudande?


Då har vi jobbet för dig!


2c8 är ett produktbolag med nöjda kunder över hela världen. Hos oss får du vara med och vidareutveckla en produkt över tid – från idé till lansering och vidare. Du jobbar nära produktägare och designers för att skapa moderna och användarvänliga lösningar med fokus på kvalitet, prestanda och långsiktighet.

**Om rollen**
-------------


Vi behöver stärka upp vår produktutvecklingsförmåga och som senior Frontendutvecklare så kommer du att ha en viktig roll i resan från desktopprodukt till webbklient. Vidare bidrar du till att skapa en balans i teamets eget nyttjande av AI samt hur AI kan passa in i produkterbjudandet.

**Du ansvarar för att:**

* Utveckla och vidareutveckla användarnära produktfunktionalitet.
* Frontendutveckling, särskilt i Angular.
* Bidra till tekniska vägval och struktur i produktnära utveckling.
* Samarbeta nära andra utvecklare och relevanta intressenter för att forma användbara och hållbara lösningar.
* Vara med och bedöma när LLM-baserad funktionalitet kan skapa verkligt värde i produkten.
* Vid behov bidra fullstack, men med tydlig styrka på Frontend.
* Bidra till långsiktighet, stabilitet och stärka intern förankring i produktutvecklingen.

**Utbildning, erfarenhet och kompetenser**
------------------------------------------


Du är högskoleutbildad web-utvecklare, dataingenjör eller motsvarande och behärskar engelska och svenska flytande i tal och skrift.

**Vidare har du:**

* Flera års erfarenhet av Frontendutveckling eller fullstack.
* Erfarenhet av DevOps-flöden.
* God förmåga att ta ansvar för hela leveranskedjan till kund.
* Stark kompetens inom Angular.
* God förståelse för Git.
* God förmåga att skapa enhetstester och integrationstester.
* Flera års erfarenhet av agil mjukvaruutveckling.


Arbetet innebär kontakter med olika intressenter och andra roller i företaget. Därför värderar vi samarbetsförmåga och kommunikativ förmåga högt.

**Meriterande är:**

* Erfarenhet av att skapa användarnära funktionalitet där funktionaliteten använder AI (LLM-baserad teknik).
* Erfarenhet av produktutveckling med långvarig förvaltning.

**Att arbeta hos oss**
----------------------


Vi är ett starkt sammansvetsat gäng som jobbar nära varandra, över avdelningsgränser och där beslutsvägarna är korta. Tillsammans skapar vi en trivsam och prestigelös miljö där vi har det roligt på jobbet, samtidigt som vi alla bidrar till produkter och tjänster vi är stolta över. På 2c8 finns det stora möjligheter att vara med och påverka verksamheten och driva idéer från ax till limpa. Det är viktigt för oss att ge varje medarbetare utrymme att utvecklas och växa i sin roll. Utöver fantastiska kollegor har vi fina lokaler och förmåner.

**Vem är du?**
--------------


Du har stark samarbetsförmåga, trivs i en miljö där man hjälps åt och där kunden alltid är i fokus. Du är nyfiken på ny teknik men inte okritisk. Du är självdriven och har god förmåga att prioritera och fokusera på det som är viktigast. Du tycker om att ha kul på jobbet och bidrar själv till ett trevligt arbetsklimat.

**Låter det intressant?**
-------------------------


Då är Du varmt välkommen att skicka in din ansökan till oss.


Vi kommer att ta en paus under sommaren och starta urvalsprocessen i augusti. Sista dagen att ansöka är 2026-08-03.

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Cleeven is an engineering, R&D and IT consulting group supporting our clients both on a strategic and operational level. We have know-how and experience in a wide range of sectors such as: Energy, banking, aerospace & defence, transportation, pharmaceuticals & chemicals, as well as IT & telecom.
 



  





 We are currently expanding our team and looking for talented and passionate DevOps engineers to join our dynamic team. As a DevOps engineer, you will play a crucial role in building, automating and maintaining robust infrastructure and deployment pipelines across various projects and industries.
 



  





**Your responsibilities** 



* Design and maintenance of CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation across development and production environments
* Ensure infrastructure and systems comply with relevant security standards and best practices
* Development and implementation of infrastructure-as-code, monitoring and alerting solutions
* Build DevOps strategies from scratch, create technical roadmaps and drive platform reliability initiatives
* Ensuring systems meet availability, scalability and performance requirements
* Collaborating with developers, architects and stakeholders to understand project requirements and streamline delivery workflows



  





**Qualifications** 



* Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology or similar
* Proven experience in DevOps, platform engineering or systems administration
* Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a team environment
* Good communication and collaboration abilities
* A passion for learning and adapting to new technologies and methodologies



  





 The most common technical tools and technologies we use on our projects in this field are:
 


* CI/CD & automation: Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions
* Containerisation & orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm
* Cloud platforms: AWS, Azure, GCP
* Infrastructure-as-code: Terraform, Ansible
* Monitoring & observability: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack
* Methodologies: DevSecOps, Scrum / Agile



  





 We look forward to your application!

title: RedHat OpenShift Engineer
description:

**Location – Stockholm, Sweden**

**Onsite Role**

* .Experience defining security posture for Kubernetes/OpenShift (RBAC, OPA/Gatekeeper, secrets management)
* .Excellent stakeholder management, communication, and documentation skills

description:

title: Azure Cloud Engineer
description:
**Bygg förtroende hos kund genom stabila och smarta Azurelösningar**
 Vill du vara den som kunder vänder sig till när deras molnplattform verkligen behöver fungera som den ska?
   

  

 Som senior Azure Cloud Engineer arbetar du nära kund i en rådgivande och leveransnära roll. Här kombineras tekniskt djup med ett tydligt konsultansvar, där du både förvaltar och vidareutvecklar deras Azuremiljöer med fokus på automation, standardisering och långsiktig stabilitet.
   

  

 Du driver förbättringar i befintliga plattformar och säkerställer att lösningarna inte bara fungerar här och nu, utan håller över tid. I dialog med kund fångar du upp behov, sätter riktning och omsätter dem till genomtänkta tekniska lösningar som skapar verkligt värde.
   

  

 Så bidrar du i rollen
   

  

  

* Förvaltar, vidareutvecklar och kvalitetssäkrar kunders Azuremiljöer
* Designar och implementerar lösningar i Microsoft Azure
* Automatiserar och standardiserar infrastruktur, främst med PowerShell
* Arbetar med Azure Landing Zones för skalbara och säkra plattformar
* Deltar i tekniska dialoger och ger rekommendationer till kund
* Samarbetar med specialister inom Cloud, Security, Network och Workplace
* Bidrar till förbättringar i arbetssätt, automation och leverans Vad vi söker hos dig


 Du bygger förtroende i kunddialogen genom att förstå behov på djupet och sätta tekniska frågor i ett större sammanhang. Du förklarar lösningar på ett sätt som går att ta beslut på och tar ansvar för att de fungerar i praktiken.
   

  

 Samtidigt driver du dina uppdrag framåt, prioriterar mellan flera parallella leveranser och söker stöd när det höjer kvalitet eller tempo. Du identifierar förbättringar och bidrar till mer standardiserade och hållbara sätt att arbeta.
   

  

 Det här ser vi att du har med dig
   

  

  

* Senior erfarenhet av drift, infrastruktur eller molnplattformar
* Erfarenhet av design, implementation och förvaltning i Azure
* Goda kunskaper i PowerShell och erfarenhet av automation
* Erfarenhet av Azure Landing Zones
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt i kunddialog och rådgivning
* Förmåga att kommunicera tekniska lösningar tydligt
* Mycket god svenska och god engelska
* Möjlighet att resa i tjänsten vid behov


 Det är ett extra plus om du har
   

  

  

* Microsoft Azure certifieringar
* Erfarenhet från hybridmiljöer och migreringar
* Azure DevOps, Git och CI/CD
* Bicep, ARM, Terraform eller liknande
* Förståelse för säkerhet, governance och best practice i Azure
* Erfarenhet av att leda tekniska delar av kundprojekt
* Vana att använda AI i arbetet för struktur och effektivisering


 Vårt erbjudande till dig
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett specialistteam med hög teknisk kompetens där du får arbeta nära både kunder och kollegor inom flera teknikområden.
   

  

 Hos oss får du:
   

  

  

* Arbeta med komplexa Azuremiljöer där din kompetens verkligen gör skillnad.
* Ta ett stort eget ansvar i kundnära leveranser, med mandat att påverka riktning och lösning.
* Driva och utveckla automation, standardisering och bättre arbetssätt över tid.
* Samarbeta med erfarna specialister och dela kunskap i ett team som präglas av tillit och professionalism.
* Möjlighet att fortsätta utvecklas, både tekniskt och i din roll som rådgivare.


 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! 👋
   

  

 Visa gärna ditt intresse så snart som möjligt då vi intervjuar löpande, med ett kortare paus under juli månad. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och synsätt, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och stärker såväl effektivitet som kreativitet i vårt arbete.
   

  

 Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår våra slutkandidater en obligatorisk bakgrundskontroll, en för oss kvalitativ kontroll inför ett anställningsbeslut. Advania samarbetar med Ljung & Sjöberg i ärenden kopplat till alkohol-, drog- och spelproblematik och är en certifierad "Proaktiv Arbetsplats".
   

  

 Tveka inte att höra av dig om du har några frågor eller funderingar. ☀️
   

  

 Det är du som arbetar nära kunden som vet vad dem behöver och vad som blir den bästa lösningen för just deras unika behov, både i dag och i morgon. Därför tycker vi att det är du som ska fatta besluten. Det är genom att erbjuda säkra, hållbara och kundanpassade lösningar som vi skapar värde för kunderna och samhället i stort.
   

  

 Vi bryr oss om hur våra medarbetare mår – på riktigt. Därför samarbetar Advania med Ljung & Sjöberg för att skapa en trygg, proaktiv arbetsmiljö med stöd kring alkohol-, drog- och beroenderelaterade frågor. Tillsammans bygger vi en hållbar arbetsplats där det är okej att be om hjälp, och där förebyggande arbete gör skillnad – för individen, teamet och företaget.
   

  

 I en miljö präglad av stort kundfokus och frihet under ansvar blir det extra viktigt för oss att bygga starka team bestående av ödmjuka stjärnor. Att arbeta i en inkluderande miljö, med kollegor och kunder som vill utvecklas, ger oss möjligheten att trivas och ha riktigt roligt på jobbet. Vi tror på en platt organisation med agilt arbetssätt och flexibilitet. Detta är det enda sättet för en hållbar framtid.
   

  

 Advania Sverige, ”The tech company with people at heart”, har kontor över hela landet, från Luleå i norr till Malmö i syd. Dagligen hjälper våra 1 700 specialister våra kunder, både inom privat och offentlig sektor, i deras ambitioner och mål att digitalisera sina verksamheter. Genom långsiktiga relationer, ledande teknologier, moderna plattformslösningar och strategiska partnerskap formar vi framtidens IT-landskap. Vårt syfte sträcker sig bortom teknik: att ge människor kraften att skapa hållbara värden.
   

  

 Advaniagruppen levererar tjänster till kunder i Sverige, Norge, Storbritannien, Island, Finland och Danmark inom hållbar och säker digitalisering.

title: Application Manager Jira/Devops, Agile Coach
description:
**APPLICATION MANAGER JIRA/DEVOPS, AGILE COACH**
**Would you like to work in an international environment where you’ll make a difference every day? At Permobil, we’re looking for game-changers to join us as we innovate for individuals and develop the world’s most advanced assistive solutions.**
 At
 **Permobil** 
 , the people who use our products come first. Our purpose is to create advanced assistive solutions that make the lives of adults and children living with disabilities more enriching. Our people are passionate about pushing the boundaries of technology to deliver innovations that improve lives. We are a sustainable and responsible business committed to continuous improvement, and our customers can trust us to provide market-leading solutions driven by insights-based clinical data.
   

  

**Position Overview**
 We are looking for an experienced and driven
 **Application Manager for Jira and Azure DevOps who will also act as an Agile Coach** 
 , playing a key role in Permobil IT:s digital and organizational transformation. This role sits within the Innovation and Quality team in Group IT and is responsible for owning and evolving the Jira and Confluence and the Microsoft Azure DevOps platforms, while actively driving the agile transformation across IT. You will combine technical platform ownership with coaching, facilitation, and change leadership, ensuring agile ways of working at scale.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Own and continuously develop Jira, Confluence, and Azure DevOps, ensuring governance, performance, and business alignment,
* Define and drive best practices, standards, and scalable ways of working across teams,
* Align agile processes, reduce tool silos, and improve integrations across platforms,
* Lead agile transformation by coaching teams, leaders, and key roles,
* Facilitate continuous improvement through workshops, retrospectives, and data-driven insights,
* Act as a change agent, identifying improvement opportunities and driving adoption,
* Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business needs into effective solutions and ensure long-term success.


**Qualifications & Skills**
* Degree in Computer Science or Information Technology
* Proven experience as an Application Manager, Jira Administrator, or similar role
* Proven experience with Azure DevOps administration
* Strong background as an Agile Coach or Scrum Master
* Deep knowledge of Jira and Confluence administration, configuration, and best practices
* Experience driving agile transformations in complex organizations
* Understanding of DevOps, product development, and IT delivery models
* Strong facilitation, communication, and stakeholder management skills


**Who are you?**
 You are a strategic thinker with a strong ability to translate vision into practical, hands-on execution. With natural leadership and influencing skills, you build trust and engagement across teams and stakeholders. You take a structured, analytical, and data-driven approach to problem-solving, using insights to guide decisions and improvements. At the same time, you have a talent for simplifying complexity and driving adoption of new ways of working. Above all, you are passionate about continuous improvement and innovation, always looking for better ways to create value and enable progress.
   

  

**Why is Permobil the next step for you?**
* You’ll make a difference. Every day. Everything we do leads to understanding and improving the lives of our users. Through our evidence-based innovation, we make a difference to people’s lives.
* You’ll make your mark as part of our future. We collaborate with colleagues across borders to Innovate for Individuals. The impact you make personally could lead change around the world.
* You’ll feel welcome from day one. We’re known for being great colleagues, who are collaborative, fun and at the cutting-edge. Everyone at Permobil cares as much as you do about making a positive difference.


 At Permobil, you’ll be part of a purpose-driven organization where technology and innovation directly improve people’s lives. In this role, you will have a significant impact on how IT operates, shaping the future of agile ways of working across the company.
   

  

**Application Process**
 We will conduct selection continuously so send us your application today or before
 **May 5th** 
 at the latest!
   

  

 Permobil is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity and inclusion. We welcome applications from all qualified individuals.
   

  

 For more information about the position, please contact Mats Weckberg, Director Enterprise Architecture, mats.weckberg@permobil.com
   

  

 For information about the recruitment process, please contact Zivile Mitkute, Talent Acquisition Partner, zivile.mitkute@permobil.com
   

  

 Please respect that we do not wish recruitment assistance or advertising, we decline calls from recruitment and advertising providers.
   

  

**More About Permobil**
 Permobil founder Dr. Per Uddén believed that helping people achieve the greatest level of independence is a basic human right and, for over 50 years, Permobil has held fast to that belief. Permobil is a global leader in advanced rehabilitation technology, passionate about better understanding our users’ needs and improving their quality of life through state-of-the-art healthcare solutions. Today, those solutions include power wheelchairs, seating and positioning products, power assist, and manual wheelchairs.
   

  

 Permobil is part of Patricia Industries, a subsidiary of Investor AB, and is headquartered in Sweden. Permobil has 2 000 team members in 18 countries around the world. For more information regarding the company’s storied history and complete product line, visit permobil.com.

title: Solution Engineer
description:
At Snowflake, we are powering the era of the agentic enterprise. To usher in this new era, we seek AI-native thinkers across every function who are energized by the opportunity to reinvent how they work. You don’t just use tools; you possess an innate curiosity, treating AI as a high-trust collaborator that is core to how you solve problems and accelerate your impact. We look for low-ego individuals who thrive in dynamic and fast-moving environments and move with an experimental mindset — who rapidly test emerging capabilities to discover simpler, more powerful ways to deliver results. At Snowflake, your role isn't just to execute a function, but to help redefine the future of how work gets done.


Snowflake is built on a culture of impact and innovation. We are looking for a **Solution Engineer** who is ready to solve complex data challenges and help enterprises realize the full potential of the **AI Data Cloud**.


In this role, you will partner with account teams to understand customer needs, strategize on technical evaluations, and demonstrate why Snowflake is the premier platform for the AI and data frontier.

**THE ROLE**

* **Present & Vision-Set:** Deliver Snowflake’s technology story to everyone from technical contributors to C-suite executives.
* **Hands-on Proof:** Conduct deep-dive demos and Proofs of Concept (POCs) that translate features into tangible business value.
* **Healthy Consumption:** Act as a trusted advisor to ensure customers are using Snowflake efficiently and effectively, driving long-term value and sustainable growth.
* **Strategic Partnership:** Collaborate with **Solution Engineers**, Product, and Engineering teams to drive technical wins and refine our product roadmap.
* **Market Mastery:** Stay at the cutting edge of the industry, positioning Snowflake effectively against competitive and complementary technologies.

**WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR**


Although it is a huge plus, we don’t require prior **Solution Engineering** experience for this associate role. Instead, we are looking for the right **traits, hunger, and a specific "X Factor"** that sets you apart.

* **The X Factor:** You bring a unique technical edge. This could be **hands-on AI/ML expertise** (building models, LLMs, or neural networks) or significant **hands-on experience with Snowflake or similar platforms**.
* **Coachability:** You are humble, hungry to learn, and thrive on constructive feedback.
* **Curiosity:** You are a natural "student of the game" who obsessively follows the latest trends in AI, data architecture, and cloud ecosystems.
* **Communication:** You can bridge the gap between deep technical code and high-level business strategy.
* **Technical Foundation:** Proficiency in **SQL** is required. Familiarity with **Python** or modern data stacks (dbt, Spark, Git) is a major plus.

**WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS**

* **Impact:** You aren't just selling software; you are architecting the **AI Data Cloud**, enabling organizations to mobilize data with near-unlimited scale and performance.
* **Growth:** We provide the mentorship to turn your technical skills into a world-class Solution Engineering career.
* **Culture:** We value big thinkers who challenge the status quo, move fast, and are "All In" on customer success.

**Think you have the "X Factor" but don't tick every traditional box? Apply anyway. We want to see what you can build.**


Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.


How do you want to make your impact?


For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com
company_description: Organizations use Snowflake's Data Cloud to unite siloed data, discover, and securely share data, and execute diverse analytic workloads across multiple clouds.

title: Staff Automation Controls Engineer
description:
Bring more to life.
  
Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real difference within life sciences, diagnostics and biotechnology?
  
At Cepheid, one of Danaher’s 15+ operating companies, our work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment to innovate for tangible impact.
  
You’ll thrive in a culture of belonging where you and your unique viewpoint matter. And by harnessing Danaher’s system of continuous improvement, you help turn ideas into impact – innovating at the speed of life.
  
At Cepheid, we are passionate about improving health care through fast, accurate, molecular diagnostic systems and tests. As a member of our team, you’ll get to make an immediate, measurable impact on a global scale, within an environment that fosters career growth and development. Our mission drives us to develop groundbreaking solutions for the world’s most complex health challenges. Together, we bring MORE change to the world.
  
Learn about the Danaher Business System which makes everything possible.
  
The Staff Automation Controls Engineer collaborates with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration automation software components. They design, configure, implement, and maintain Ignition SCADA systems for manufacturing processes and equipment. Additionally, collaborate with IT team to implement cybersecurity measures to protect controls and SCADA systems from cyber threats and ensure data integrity and system reliability.
  
The Staff Automation and Controls Engineer stays current on industry advancements and best practices in controls and SCADA technologies to proactively identify opportunities for system enhancements and upgrades.
  
This position reports to the Manager – Automation and Controls and is part of the Automation Controls, Electrical & Safety Engineering group located in Solna, Sweden and will be an on-site role.
  
  

**In this role, you will have the opportunity to:**  

Be part of the full Project development lifecycle (including, architecture, design, implementation, review, validation, support, version control using GitLab).
  
As an expert in Ignition and Controls, be a mentor to other engineers in the team.
  
Design custom automation equipment & develop programs for SCADA (Ignition), PLCs HMIs, and all required ancillary devices.
  
Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations related to Controls and SCADA systems design and operation.
  
Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to SCADA system performance, communication protocols and data acquisition.
  
  

**The essential requirements of the job include:**  

Bachelor’s degree with 8+ years of related work experience OR Master’s degree in field with 6+ years of related work experience OR Doctoral degree in field with 3+ years of work experience.
  
Must have in-depth PLC program design and development Rockwell software (RS Logix, FactoryTalk), and Vision Inspection Systems (Cognex) experience.
  
In depth experience with Ignition’s both Perspective and Vision modules, Database (PostgreSQL and MySQL) management, python scripting and Ignition historian module.
  
Experience working various device interfaces like DeviceNet, Ethernet/IP, OPC UA, TCP, UDP, MQTT, SECS/GEM, REST API etc.
  
Experience in implementing and managing complex on-prem and cloud architecture for Ignition SCADA system.
  
  

**Travel:**  

Ability to travel up to ~15%, including overnight stays as needed, to other company sites, or manufacturing facilities of equipment builders. International travel may be required depending on project scope.
  
  

**It would be a plus if you also possess previous experience in:**
  
Integrating MES systems with SCADA.
  
Working in an FDA regulated environment.
  
Project management skills are a plus.
  
  

Join our winning team today. Together, we’ll accelerate the real-life impact of tomorrow’s science and technology. We partner with customers across the globe to help them solve their most complex challenges, architecting solutions that bring the power of science to life.
  
For more information, visit www.danaher.com.
company_description: Our mission is to deliver a better way to improve patient outcomes by enabling access to molecular diagnostic testing everywhere.

title: Lead, Energy Strategic Negotiator (Finnish, English)
description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following: **Stockholm, Sweden; Helsinki, Finland**.### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 6 years of experience negotiating and structuring agreements or leading business development.
* Ability to communicate in English and Finnish fluently to support client relationship management in this region.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Experience with power transmission and distribution, telecommunications infrastructure, data center technology, industrial-class electrical and cooling technology, or other related technical areas.
* Experience managing utility agreements and energy-related issues.
* Experience in financial modeling and implementing clean energy initiatives.
* Experience in indirect taxes, economic development policy, infrastructure development, agreement drafting, and presentation development.
* Experience with data center real estate markets.
* Ability to comfortably work in ambiguous, collaborative, and changing environments.

**About the job**
-----------------


Google's infrastructure needs go far beyond server computers. As Google's products and services scale the globe, the Strategic Negotiation team works behind the scenes to secure infrastructure for Google's future - everything from underwater cables to physical data center space. As a Strategic Negotiator, you combine your deep market knowledge of a given sector with tech industry savvy to negotiate cost-effective solutions to support Google's infrastructure growth. You'll work with specific project teams on negotiating deals, managing vendor and partner relationships and presenting deal recommendations to our Tech leadership. Your successful negotiations have the potential to save Google millions of dollars in operating costs and impact every part of the business.



Google's infrastructure needs go far beyond server computers. As Google's products and services scale the globe, the Energy and Location Strategy team works behind the scenes to secure electric power for Google's global fleet of data centers.  

  

In this role, you will combine your financial acumen, industry experience and persuasion skills to analyze and communicate trends, and evaluate supply, investment opportunities, and agreements structures. You'll work with project teams to support transactions, energy portfolio planning, and vendor and partner relationship management. Your ability to develop and communicate recommendations based on this analysis, has the potential to save Google millions of dollars in operating costs, drive innovation in the energy industry and impact every part of the business.

  

Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.Individual pay is determined by factors including job-related skills, experience, and relevant education or training.
  

  

Finland: €98000 - €101000 (EUR) + 15% bonus target + equity + benefits  

Sweden: kr1080000 - kr1110000 (SEK) + 15% bonus target + equity + benefits  

  

Learn more about benefits at Google.**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Discuss all types of agreements with all types of vendors within a domain. Lead the development of agreements with vendors, landowners, and key suppliers for space and utility services.
* Lead transaction discussion and structuring for energy supply, power infrastructure, and other data center energy contracts, including supply agreements, interconnection agreements, power purchases agreements, partnerships, etc.
* Implement commercial strategies for new power generation resources (either on, near, or offsite), transmission system expansion, and other novel approaches of capacity delivery for new large loads.
* Help set strategy for Google's energy procurement program, including renewable and carbon-free energy procurement in support of Google's clean energy goals.
* Support site specific energy supply growth efforts and datacenter interconnection strategy and execution in partnership with local utilities and transmission system operators (TSOs).
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.
company_description: Our mission is to organize the world’s information and make it universally accessible and useful.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.


We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a **Machine Learning Engineer** in our **Stockholm** office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?


### **The Role**


As a Machine Learning Engineer at Viaplay, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the next generation of our data-driven products and services. Working at the intersection of personalization, customer engagement, and operational intelligence, you’ll design and deploy state-of-the-art ML systems that directly impact millions of users across our platform.


Your responsibilities will extend far beyond model development. You’ll act as a strategic partner to product, engineering, and commercial teams, translating business objectives into scalable, high-impact ML solutions. Whether enhancing our recommendation engines, uncovering deep user insights, or enabling smarter decision-making across the organization, your work will be central to Viaplay’s continued growth and innovation.


You’ll join a high-performing, inclusive, and curious team of ML Engineers, Data Scientists, Analysts, and Data Engineers. Together, we foster a culture of experimentation, shared ownership, and technical excellence. Our recommender system already powers engaging user experiences, and we’re only at the beginning of our machine learning journey.


**What You’ll Be Doing**


* Design, develop, and deploy scalable machine learning models for recommendation, prediction, and classification use cases.
* Own and lead end-to-end ML initiatives, from ideation and stakeholder alignment to development, deployment, and ongoing performance evaluation.
* Translate business needs into structured ML problems and deliver measurable, impactful outcomes.
* Build robust, production-ready pipelines and monitor ML systems in a cloud-native environment.
* Conduct advanced statistical analyses to uncover trends in user behavior, content performance, and platform engagement.
* Collaborate closely with product, engineering, content, commercial, and marketing teams to drive data-informed decision-making.
* Contribute to a culture of experimentation, innovation, and continuous learning within the data team.

### **What we’re looking for**


We're seeking someone who combines technical depth with strategic thinking and a curious, problem-solving mindset.


We understand you may feel confident ticking certain boxes more than others and that’s why we always keep an open mind in our recruitment process. But, in order to thrive in this role, we do believe you’ll have at least some experience in the following:


* Proven experience leading ML projects end-to-end, from problem definition and stakeholder alignment to deployment and monitoring in production.
* Expertise in one or more ML domains such as LLMs, NLP, recommendation systems, or reinforcement learning.
* Ability to build ML solutions that are scalable, robust, and explainable, not just performant in isolation.
* Strong experience deploying ML models in cloud environments (preferably AWS) and using containerization tools like Docker .
* Familiarity with orchestration tools such as Airflow for reliable ML pipeline execution and monitoring
* Solid software engineering fundamentals.
* 5+ years of hands-on experience in applied Machine Learning within production environments.
* Strong academic background in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field.

**It’s a bonus if you have:**


* Experience with recommender systems, personalization, or content optimization — ideally in media, streaming, or e-commerce.
* Familiarity with MLOps practices, including CI/CD for ML, model monitoring, and production observability.
* Exposure to real-time or near-real-time ML architectures and streaming data systems.

### **What we offer you**


* **We’ve got you covered!** 30 days of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
* **Your wellbeing matters.** We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
* **Flexibility that works.** We follow a hybrid model with at least three days a week in the office, giving you the best mix of collaboration and focus time.
* **A safe space to grow and up-skill.** Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
* **An innovative environment with Hack Days once a year.** This week-long initiative allows you to think outside the box and deliver creative, technical solutions that (more often than not) go on to be implemented, either in our product or our ways of working.
* **Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do.** So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including serier & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.

### **Hit play today**


If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position.
  

  

Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

title: M365 Security Engineer
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.


We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a **M365 Security Engineer** in our **Stockholm** office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?


### **The Role**


We are seeking an experienced M365 Security Engineer to join our IT Workplace team, working as a core team member with shared responsibility and close, hands‑on collaboration across all areas of IT. You will support security operations, governance, and compliance within an outsourced, Microsoft‑based hybrid IT environment.


The role is responsible for protecting the organisation against cyber threats and embedding security best practices across the Group. You will work closely with colleagues and an outsourced IT partner to deliver effective and pragmatic security outcomes.


You will act as a technical lead for security operations, incident response, and security tooling, working collaboratively rather than in isolation, and ensuring security is integrated into day‑to‑day IT operations and change initiatives.


**Key Responsibilities:**


* Act as a security lead for IT modernisation and improvement initiatives
* Work with the SOC partner to monitor, investigate, and respond to security alerts and incidents across cloud, on‑premises, and SaaS environments
* Act as the technical escalation point for high‑priority security incidents, coordinating containment, remediation, and recovery activities
* Perform root cause analysis and post‑incident reviews, communicating risks and outcomes to both technical and non‑technical stakeholders.
* Administer and operate security tooling, primarily Microsoft Purview, Defender, and Entra
* Design and manage the implementation of Zero Trust controls utilising Conditional Access, PIM, RBAC, and identity governance
* Maintain and improve security policies, ensuring alignment with recognised standards and regulatory requirements such as ISO 27001 and NIS2
* Support vulnerability management activities, audits, penetration testing, and third‑party risk assessments
* Produce incident, threat, and compliance reporting for stakeholders
* Drive continuous improvement of security controls, tooling, and processes

### **What we’re looking for**


We understand you may feel confident ticking certain boxes more than others and that’s why we always keep an open mind in our recruitment process. But, in order to thrive in this role, we do believe you’ll have at least some experience in the following:


* 5+ years’ experience in cybersecurity or security operations roles
* Hands‑on experience with Microsoft Purview, Defender, Entra, and vulnerability and threat management tools.
* Experience working with outsourced IT services and SOC partners
* Microsoft security certifications and other industry‑recognised cybersecurity certifications are highly desirable
* Strong analytical, problem‑solving, and communication skills, with the ability to produce clear technical and non‑technical documentation
* Relevant education in IT, cybersecurity, or a related discipline, or equivalent professional experience

### **What we offer you**


* **We’ve got you covered!** 30 days of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
* **Your wellbeing matters.** We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
* **A safe space to grow and up-skill.** Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
* **An innovative environment with Hack Days once a year.** This week-long initiative allows you to think outside the box and deliver creative, technical solutions that (more often than not) go on to be implemented, either in our product or our ways of working.
* **Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do.** So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including serier & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.

### **Hit play today**


If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position.
  

  

Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

title: Inside Sales Representative Swedish Danish Market
description:
**Overview**
------------


At NetApp, we have a history of helping customers turn challenges into business opportunities. As part of our sales organization, your role will require a strategic blend of technical acumen and charismatic client engagement, ensuring that every partnership is nurtured towards it maximum potential. As a pivotal link between NetApp and our clients, your contributions will directly influence the growth and direction of our department, making a lasting impact on the organization's success. This is more than a job—it's a chance to be part of a team that values innovation, supports professional growth, and celebrates shared victories.
  
**Own Every Moment at NetApp**


At NetApp, your ideas power innovation. We lead in intelligent data infrastructure—delivering unified storage, integrated data services, and solutions that help organizations unlock the full potential of their data, from AI to multicloud.


Ready to innovate and contribute to our path to $10B? Here, you'll collaborate with passionate teams, tackle real-world challenges, and see your impact in how customers transform and grow. If you're ready to bring curiosity, creativity, and drive to every moment, NetApp is where your journey begins.


**Job Summary**
---------------

* The market is shifting fast. AI is accelerating. Data is exploding. Customers are urgently rethinking how they modernize, secure, and unlock value from their environments. NetApp is built for this exact moment, with a differentiated platform, deep enterprise credibility, and a clear strategy to win.
* Joining NetApp now means operating in a high achievement environment where you are empowered to own every moment. Our culture is grounded in three principles: innovate to elevate, drive results, excel as a team. These are more than words. They define how we show up, how we sell, and how we grow.
* As an Inside Sales Representative at NetApp, you will play a key role in driving new customer acquisition and growth. You’ll use outbound and inbound prospecting to engage prospects and existing customers through an omni-channel approach, to discover, qualify and understand their business challenges, and position NetApp’s hybrid cloud and data solutions to meet their needs.
* Working closely with our channel, marketing, and technical teams, you will build and manage your own pipeline, generate new opportunities, and contribute directly to NetApp’s success in a fast-moving, collaborative environment.
**Job Responsibilities**
------------------------

* Drive customer and cross-selling acquisition through phone, email, and digital outreach.
* Prospect in and outbound, to drive new qualified pipeline, discover and qualify.
* Understand customer needs and clearly communicate NetApp’s value propositions across 3-5 use cases
* Collaborate with the channel to deliver proposals.
* Generate new business through proactive prospecting, including cold calling and targeted campaigns & social selling.
* Support marketing initiatives such as events, webinars, and lead-generation campaigns.
* Maintain accurate pipeline management, forecasting, and activity tracking in CRM systems.
* Work closely with sales, technical specialists, and channel teams to ensure a seamless customer experience.
**Job Requirements**
--------------------

* Min. of 2 years of experience in inside-sales, or a related field (internships welcome), mainly focused on full pipeline ownership (prospect to close)
* Strong communication skills with the ability to influence and persuade in both written and verbal formats.
* Experience using prospecting tools such as ZoomInfo, LinkedIn Navigator, and CRM platforms.
* Genuine curiosity and understanding of cloud, storage, or IT solutions.
* Self-motivated, organized, and able to manage multiple priorities.
* Fluent in English, Swedish or Danish and comfortable working in an international environment.
* Bonus experience:
* B2B sales
* IT or cloud industry exposure
* Familiarity with partner ecosystems (resellers, distributors, system integrators)

At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in-office and/or in-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.


**Equal Opportunity Employer:**


NetApp is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination based on age, race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, religion, disability or genetic information, pregnancy, protected veteran status, and any other protected classification.

**Why You'll Thrive at NetApp**


At NetApp, you won't wait for the perfect moment—you'll make it. The early planning, the extra thought, the bold idea that turns good into great: That's how our people operate and how we continue to push the boundaries of data infrastructure.


NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. As the only enterprise-grade storage service natively embedded in Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure, we empower customers to run everything from traditional workloads to enterprise AI with unmatched performance, resilience, and security.

**Our culture**


We celebrate mold breakers, bold thinkers, and problem solvers. We reward initiative, impact, and ownership. We provide flexibility so you can balance professional ambition with your personal life. Here, differences are not just welcomed—they drive everything we do.


If you're ready to innovate, rise to the challenge, and own every moment - make your next move your best one. now.


**Submitting an application**  

  

To ensure a streamlined and fair hiring process for all candidates, our team only reviews applications submitted through our company website. This practice allows us to track, assess, and respond to applicants efficiently. Emailing our employees, recruiters, or Human Resources personnel directly will not influence your application.


  
**Our values**
--------------


Put the customer at the center. Care for each other and our communities. Think and act like owners. Build belonging every day. Embrace a growth mindset.


  
**Benefits**
------------


### **Volunteer time off**


40 hours of paid volunteer time each year.
### **Well-being**


Employee Assistance Program, fitness, and mental health resources to help employees be their best.
### **Time away**


Paid time off for vacation and to recharge.

title: Head of Platforms & Software
description:
*Are you driven to see your ideas become reality? Welcome to our exciting and technology-intensive world.*


Your role


As Head of Platforms and Software, you will lead the delivery and operational performance of C5ISR platforms and software-centric capabilities. You hold end-to-end responsibility for contract execution, people, and long-term customer relationships across ongoing and future engagements. You ensure that core software components such as IEG, multi-sensor optimisation, data fusion, ID fusion, situation detection, and software-defined networking are integrated and continuously evolved into measurable operational advantage.


Together with product management, strategy, and business development, you position platforms and software as key value drivers in Saab’s C5ISR/C6ISR portfolio. You also build and lead a high-performing, multidisciplinary organisation across software engineering, architecture, AI/ML, cloud, and integration, while acting as a senior Saab representative in customer engagements.


The position is based in Solna.


Your profile


You are a leader who naturally bridges technology, operations, and business, comfortable moving between architectural choices and contract conversations in the same day. You combine deep technical understanding with the leadership instinct to grow people and turn capability into customer value. Building trust, both with your team and with senior customers, is something you take seriously.


We believe you have:

* Strong background in software development, systems architecture, AI/ML, and/or cloud technologies
* Proven track record leading complex, software-intensive delivery programs with full responsibility for contracts, delivery, and financial outcomes
* Experience integrating and delivering scalable platforms and modular software components in operational settings
* Strong leadership skills with the ability to grow and develop high-performing technical teams
* Working knowledge of modern software practices such as DevSecOps, CI/CD, cloud-native design, and secure architectures
* A Master’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Systems Engineering, or a related field


Beneficial Qualifications:

* Understanding of C5ISR systems and the role of software-defined capabilities in modern defence environments
* Experience working closely with defence or government customers, translating needs into deployed solutions


The position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around security protection. For positions where Saab requires security classification, this may, where applicable, entail requirements regarding specific citizenship.


What you’ll be part of


Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.


Saab is a leading defence and security company with an enduring mission, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 26,100 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.


Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defence capability of several nations. Read more about us here

*Kindly observe that this is an ongoing recruitment process and that the position might be filled before the closing date of the advertisement.*
