title: Snowflake Architect
description:
a { text-decoration: none; color: #464feb; } tr th, tr td { border: 1px solid #e6e6e6; } tr th { background-color: #f5f5f5; }
   

  

**About Cognizant**
 Cognizant is one of the world's leading professional services companies, helping organizations modernize technology, reimagine processes, and transform experiences so they stay ahead in a fast-changing world. With over 300,000 associates globally, Cognizant combines a passion for client satisfaction, technology innovation, deep industry and business process expertise, and a global, collaborative workforce that embodies the future of work. We are consistently listed among the most admired companies in the world and among the best companies to work for. Our culture is built on a foundation of transparency, inclusion, and collaboration — empowering our people to grow and thrive both professionally and personally. At Cognizant, you won't just be part of a company; you'll be part of a community that is shaping the future of industries across the globe.
   

  

**Snowflake Architect**
 We are looking for a Snowflake Architect with strong administrative capabilities to join our team. This role combines architecture and platform administration, with responsibility for performance, scalability, security, and day-to-day reliability of the Snowflake environment. The right candidate brings experience in data architecture, cloud platforms, and Snowflake operations.
   

  

**About The Team / Business Unit**
 We work across the full data and AI ecosystem in partnership with major cloud and software providers such as AWS, Microsoft, Google, Snowflake, and Databricks. Supported by local, nearshore, and offshore expertise, we help clients build scalable and cost-effective solutions. Our work includes AI-driven transformation across industries, from automation and compliance to smart manufacturing. In the Nordics, our focus is to help organizations strengthen digital maturity, accelerate innovation, and turn data into action through modern platforms and responsible AI.
   

  

**About You**
 This role combines the responsibilities of a Snowflake Architect and Administrator. Because Snowflake requires less traditional platform administration, the role offers the opportunity to combine operational ownership with architectural development and grow further as an architect.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 You will manage and optimize Snowflake environments to ensure performance, reliability, security, and cost efficiency. The role includes administration, access management, monitoring, incident handling, automation, and platform maintenance. You will also contribute to architecture design, create solution blueprints, guide technical teams, support governance and best practices, and work closely with developers, security teams, DevOps, and business stakeholders to align Snowflake capabilities with business needs.
   

  

**Required Skills & Qualifications**
 You should have strong knowledge of Snowflake architecture, including warehouses, databases, roles, and security, along with solid SQL skills and experience in performance tuning and optimization. You understand data security, compliance, cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, and data integration processes. Experience as a Snowflake Architect is required, and Snowflake certification such as SnowPro Core or higher is expected.
   

  

**Nice to Have**
 Experience in data modeling, analytics reporting, performance tuning, and data migration is an advantage.

title: Data Engineer Insight
description:
**Data Engineer till Nexer Insight!** 




  





 Vill du vara med och bygga framtidens datalösningar inom AI, machine learning och datalager?
 



  





 Nexer Insight, partner till marknadsledande molnplattformar, där innovation inom data och AI står i fokus, söker nu en Data Engineer som vill bli en del av vårt team. Hos oss får du arbeta i en engagerad och kunnig miljö tillsammans med spännande kunder, i varierande och utmanande uppdrag – samtidigt som du erbjuds goda möjligheter till utveckling och förmåner
 **.** 




  





**Kanske är du vår nästa “Data Ninja”** 




  





 Hos Nexer Insight blir du en viktig del av ett bolag som präglas av entreprenörskap och nytänkande. Hos Nexer Insight, partner med databricks, arbetar vi med den senaste tekniken från Microsoft. Här får du möjlighet att pusha gränserna inom data och molnteknik, experimentera med nya verktyg och omsätta cutting-edge tech till lösningar som skapar verkligt affärsvärde. Här möts data engineering och data science – och du är med och driver lösningar från data till affärsnytta.
 



  





**I rollen som Data Engineer kommer du att:** 



* Designa, bygga och vidareutveckla skalbara och högpresterande datalösningar
* Arbeta end-to-end med moderna dataplattformar, datamodeller och pipelines
* Samarbeta nära kunder och omsätta affärsbehov till smarta tekniska lösningar
* Säkerställa robust arkitektur med fokus på datakvalitet, tillförlitlighet och prestanda
* Jobba i framkant med den senaste tekniken inom Data och Analytics
* Arbeta med datainhämtning, transformation och lagring
* Vara med och driva våra kunders resa mot datadrivna arbetssätt genom innovativa molnlösningar



  





**Vi tror att du:** 



* Har stark erfarenhet av att arbeta med molnplattformar som Azure, AWS eller GCP
* Har flera års hands-on erfarenhet av ETL och dataintegration, exempelvis med Azure Data Factory, Databricks/Fabric, DBT eller Snowflake
* Är van vid att arbeta med moderna dataplattformar som Data Lakes eller Lakehouse-arkitektur
* Har mycket goda kunskaper i SQL och trivs med att jobba nära data
* Har erfarenhet av informationsmodellering och dimensionell modellering
* Har god förståelse för DevOps-principer, versionshantering i Git och CI/CD-flöden
* Kommunicerar obehindrat på både svenska och engelska



  





  





***Det är meriterande om du även har erfarenhet av:***



* *Modernisering av dataplattformar*
* *Tabular-modeller och DAX*
* *Data Vault-modellering*
* *Att sätta upp infrastruktur i Azure, AWS eller GCP*

title: SVT söker MLOps Engineer
description:
**Vad Vi Erbjuder Dig**
 SVT bygger nu nya team inom AI och automation för att frigöra tid, förenkla arbetssätt och ge publiken ännu bättre program och journalistik. Hos oss får du vara med i en långsiktig satsning där teknik används för att stärka public service, stötta journalistiken och göra verklig skillnad i en snabbt föränderlig omvärld.
   

  

 SVT:s AI-hubb stödjer hela organisationen i att använda AI på ett ansvarsfullt och värdeskapande sätt. Som MLOps Engineer blir du en central del av AI‑hubbens tekniska leverans. Du arbetar tillsammans med ML/AI Engineers, Tech Lead och plattformsorganisationen för att AI‑ och ML‑system kan driftsättas, följas upp och fungera stabilt i produktion över tid.
   

  

**Vem Vi Tror Att Du Är**
 Du är strukturerad och ansvarstagande med fokus på att få system att fungera stabilt i produktion. Du är lösningsorienterad, samarbetar väl med olika kompetenser och arbetar pragmatiskt med kvalitet och förbättring över tid.
   

  

**Du Behöver Ha**
* Erfarenhet av drift och förvaltning av ML‑ eller AI‑system i produktion
* Erfarenhet av molnplattform (AWS, GCP eller Azure)
* Erfarenhet av containers och orkestrering (t.ex. Docker och Kubernetes)
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD för ML‑system, inklusive versionering och reproducerbarhet
* Erfarenhet av monitorering och uppföljning i drift (t.ex. modell‑/datadrift, latens, kostnad, kvalitet)
* Erfarenhet av Python i produktionsmiljö och avancerade språk som tex Rust


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av model registry (t.ex. MLflow eller motsvarande)
* Erfarenhet av LLM‑serving och optimering av inferenskostnad och latens
* Erfarenhet av självbetjäningslösningar eller plattformsstöd för ML/AI Engineers
* Erfarenhet av kostnadsuppföljning och optimering av beräkningsresurser
* Svenska eller engelska kan användas i arbetet. Svenska är meriterande.


**Vad Tjänsten Innebär**
 Du designar, bygger och förvaltar pipelines för träning, utvärdering och driftsättning av ML‑ och AI‑system. Du säkerställer att AI‑system fungerar stabilt i produktion och fångar problem innan de påverkar användarna.
   

  

 Du arbetar med att säkerställa prestanda, tillförlitlighet och kostnadseffektivitet, och möjliggör smidig driftsättning genom att utveckla lösningar för self‑service och automatisering. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med plattform, säkerhet och övriga ingenjörsroller för att skapa robusta och hållbara produktionsmiljöer.Rollen fokuserar på ML‑system i produktion och arbete nära teknik och plattform, utan ansvar för personal eller policy.
   

  

**Hur Du Ansöker**
 I den här rekryteringsprocessen använder vi urvalsfrågor och CV, du behöver alltså inte skicka med ett personligt brev. Det gör vi för att säkerställa att rekryteringen blir kompetensbaserad och effektiv. Frågorna handlar om dina erfarenheter och drivkrafter och kan ta en stund att besvara, men de gör att vi får samma viktiga information av alla kandidater. Välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-06-24. Intervjuer sker löpande.
   

  

 För mer information om tjänsten kontakta Peter Kurzwelly, Head of AI, peter.kurzwelly@svt.se. Facklig information lämnas av Fanny Lindhé (SACO), Maria Nassikas (Unionen) och Jane Andersson (SJF). Samtliga nås via växeln, tfn 08-784 00 00.
   

  

**Annat Som Är Bra Att Veta**
 Tjänsten är placerad i Stockholm och i dagsläget har vi upplägget med minst 51 % närvaro på plats. Vi erbjuder en tillsvidareanställning på heltid.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Solutions Engineer - Finland & Sweden
description:
**About The Role**
 As a Solutions Engineer, you’ll be at the cutting edge of SaaS data protection, collaborating with a dynamic global team. You’ll play a crucial role in shaping our product and guiding customers through advanced data protection and cyber threat recovery strategies.
   

  

**You will:**
* Deliver engaging presentations and product demonstrations both virtually and in person.
* Manage and implement Proof of Concepts (POCs) to ensure successful technical closure.
* Maintain Salesforce cadence with meticulous documentation.
* Support lead-generation initiatives, including events, webinars, and user groups.
* Collaborate with customers and partners to translate business objectives into technical solutions.
* Provide technical expertise on data protection through independent consultation with Keepit’s customers.
* Partner with the sales team to secure new clients and partners.
* Offer pre-sales support to customers evaluating Keepit's backup solution.
* Work closely with Product Management to relay customer feedback and insights.


**About You**
**Must-haves:**
* Familiarity with OEM, Channel, and Vendor ecosystems is highly desirable.
* Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment as a motivated self-starter.
* Strong time management and Excellent analytical and problem-solving capabilities.
* Managing multiple decision-makers to drive proposal outcomes.
* Ability to build and maintain positive relationships with both customers and colleagues.
* 3-5 years of proven experience in sales engineering or technical sales (pre-sales experience is a plus).
* Proficiency in Microsoft O365, including Exchange, OneDrive, Groups, Teams, SharePoint, and Dynamics, and strong understanding of Microsoft Azure (Power PI, Power Apps, DevOps, Power BI).
* Familiarity with other cloud-based SaaS applications is highly desirable and knowledge of MEDDIC or MEDPICC methodologies is beneficial.
* Willingness to travel 50-75%.


 We would like to connect with you.
   

  

**About Us**
 At Keepit we deliver the next-level data protection. We own and operate a vendor-independent cloud to provide next-level SaaS data protection. We offer all-inclusive, secure, and reliable backup and recovery services for our data. We are One vender, One data processing.
   

  

 We are growing fast as a company and do our best to bring our SaaS cloud-based backup services to the global audience. Our platform is designed to provide customers with an immutable historical archive of their primary data in systems such as Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Salesforce, Azure AD, Dynamics 365, and Zendesk. It aims to protect them against everything, starting from ransomware to simple accidents.
   

  

**As we collaborate across locations, English is our primary language. Please submit your CV in English to support the review process.**
*We kindly ask you not to provide us with any sensitive categories of personal data when applying for a job with us. When applying for the vacancy, Keepit will process your personal data, and therefore we recommend that you also* 
***read our***
***privacy policy***
*, which describes our processing of personal data and your rights as a data subject.*

title: Backend Engineer
description:
*Kreditz is transforming how businesses assess credit and risk using real-time data and NextGen Credit Scoring solutions.*
*As one of Europe’s fastest-growing FinTech scaleups - we’ve earned a place on the* 
***Sifted 100: Nordics & Benelux***
*list in both 2024 and 2025 and most recently, we were proud to receive a* 
***double win at the Credit Management & Compliance Awards 2025***
*, being named both "* 
***Fintech Rocket of the Year***
*" and "* 
***Breakthrough of the Year***
*".*
*With strong growth across the Nordics and Europe, our clients range from leading banks and iGaming giants to fast-moving digital innovators.*
**About The Position**
 Kreditz is looking for a
 **Backend Engineer** 
 to join our Tech team.
   

  

 In this role, you will design, develop, and evolve scalable backend services as we modernize our infrastructure. You will play an important role in shaping backend architecture, defining clear APIs between services, and ensuring our platform remains robust, secure, and efficient in a high-growth FinTech environment.
   

  

 We're looking for someone who wants to help transform a high-performing fintech platform into a billion-dollar business.
   

  

**What Can Kreditz Offer**
* A once-in-a-lifetime growth journey, from startup to Global scaleup
* A journey where everyone in the team plays a crucial role for our company’s success
* Fun-loving, driven, and passionate colleagues who support each other’s success
* A culture that celebrates progress, humility, and teamwork
* We win together
* 24/7 access to gym, sauna and sports facilities at our office, plus additional wellness allowance
* Competitive base salary


**RESPONSIBILITES**
**Some Of The Main Responsibilities You Will Cover**
* Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs
* Define and evolve backend architecture, including service boundaries and API contracts between microservices
* Build and deploy services on AWS using ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Collaborate closely with product and engineering teams to design scalable, maintainable solutions.
* Implement and maintain automated tests and CI/CD pipelines.
* Work with serverless technologies (AWS Lambda) for event processing.
* Perform code reviews and contribute hands-on to projects.
* Leverage AI agents and tools to enhance development workflows and productivity.
* Document system architecture, development processes, and integrations.


**WE ARE LOOKING FOR**
 A motivated and skilled Backend Engineer who enjoys solving complex problems and is comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment. You have strong backend fundamentals and architectural thinking, and you enjoy designing systems that scale.
   

  

**We Believe That You Have**
* A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5+ years of experience in backend development.
* Experience with Go (or willingness to pick it up quickly)
* Experience with cloud platforms, preferably AWS (ECS, Fargate, Service Connect)
* Strong experience in API design (REST and/or gRPC) and defining service contracts (OpenAPI)
* Experience designing backend architectures in microservice-based systems
* Experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Familiarity with containerization (Docker/Podman).
* Familiarity with messaging and event-driven systems (SQS, SNS)
* Experience with databases like PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, DynamoDB.
* Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools (CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, X-Ray).
* Proficiency with Git and version control workflows.
* Excellent English communication skills (Swedish is a plus).
* Interest in using AI agents and tools as part of daily development work


**Nice To Have**
* Experience with Ruby on Rails and/or Python
* Experience working in FinTech or other regulated environments


**WHY JOIN NOW?**
 At Kreditz, you'll have the opportunity to work in a cutting-edge, fast-growing FinTech company that's redefining the credit scoring industry. With the backing of major investors and a clear vision for the future, your work will make a real impact on financial inclusion worldwide. Join us and be a part of something truly transformative!
   

  

**APPOINTMENT OF ROLE**
 Q1 2026
   

  

**SCOPE**
 Full-time, permanent employment (tillsvidareanställning)
   

  

**SALARY**
 Competitive salary
   

  

**REPORTING**
 You will be reporting to the company’s VP Engineering
   

  

**WORKPLACE**
 Danderyd, Stockholm
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
 Ongoing selection, we review candidates continuously.
   

  

*Last day for applications 31st March 2026*
**CRIMINAL RECORDS EXTRACT**
 As part of our recruitment process we will ask you to present a clean criminal records extract
   

  

**CONTACT**
 Lorenzo Puccio, VP Strategic Operations, Lorenzo@kreditz.com
   

  

 For more information about the role feel free to reach out to our Co-founder/CTO, arlen@kreditz.com
   

  

 Intelligent credit- & risk decisions made easy with open banking & AI-technology

title: Data Engineer
description:
Join EQT as a Data Engineer in the Client Tech Value Stream, where you will build and scale our modern data platform. You will work across the full data lifecycle, enabling reliable, high-quality data products that support decision-making across the business.
   

  

**About The Client Tech Value Stream Team**
 The Client Tech Value Stream focuses on delivering technology and data solutions that support client, investor, and fund-related processes. The team works closely with engineering, product, CRM, and business stakeholders to build scalable platforms that enable insights and operational efficiency across EQT.
   

  

**About The Role**
 You will play a key role in designing, building, and operating EQT’s cloud-based data platform. You will work across ingestion, transformation, and data modeling to ensure high-quality, reliable, and accessible data.
   

  

* Design, build, and operate scalable data pipelines across multiple data sources.
* Ingest data from APIs, external platforms, Fivetran connectors, and cloud storage.
* Develop and maintain data models using dbt on Snowflake.
* Structure data around core business entities such as clients, investors, funds, and transactions.
* Enable analytics and reporting in tools such as Power BI, Salesforce CRM Analytics, Tableau and our AI stack.
* Monitor and troubleshoot pipelines to ensure reliability and performance.
* Collaborate with stakeholders across engineering, analytics, CRM, and business teams.
* Contribute to platform improvements and modernization of legacy pipelines.
* Support infrastructure and access management using GitHub, Terraform, and Snowflake.


**About You**
 You are an experienced Data Engineer who enjoys working across the full data stack and collaborating with diverse teams. You are comfortable working in a modern cloud environment and translating business needs into scalable data solutions. You are curious about AI and new technology, and can translate both human and machine needs into code.
   

  

**Essential skills and experience:**
* Experience building data pipelines and working with cloud data platforms.
* Experience collaborating with nontechnical stakeholders for requirements and maintenance.
* Strong SQL skills and experience with data modeling for usage by reporting tools and LLM models.
* Experience with Snowflake and dbt or similar tools.
* Experience integrating data from multiple systems such as APIs and SaaS platforms.
* Familiarity with data visualization tools such as Power BI or Tableau.
* Experience with version control and infrastructure tools such as Git and Terraform.


**Nice to have:**
* Experience with GCP and Fivetran.
* Experience working with CRM systems such as Salesforce.
* Understanding of financial or private markets data.


**What We Offer**
 You will be part of a collaborative and forward-looking team where data is central to how EQT creates value. We offer opportunities to work with modern technologies, contribute to impactful projects, and grow your skills in a global environment.
   

  

**Inclusion at** 
**EQT**
*Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact. Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.*
**About EQT**
*EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of over three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR ‌ 270 billion in total assets under management (EUR ‌ ‌141 billion in fee-generating assets under management), within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.*
*More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

 Follow EQT on LinkedIn, X, YouTube and Instagram*

title: Data Scientist
description:
**About WPP Media**
 WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth.
   

  

 WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.
   

  

 For more information, visit wppmedia.com.
   

  

**Role Summary and Impact**
 At Choreograph, part of WPP Media, we’re leading the way in data-driven marketing solutions. We collaborate with the world’s most ambitious brands to solve complex challenges in media and marketing through data and technology. From econometrics and media buying algorithms to dashboards and strategic consulting, our work has an impact.
   

  

 At Choreograph, data science plays a key role in how we support some of the world’s largest brands in making informed decisions. By leveraging advanced analytics and innovative methodologies, we empower businesses to optimize their marketing strategies and uncover insights that drive real results.
   

  

 If you’re passionate about using data to solve challenging problems and want to work with brands such as Amazon, Samsung, Tele2 and Coca-Cola in a collaborative environment, this could be the perfect role for you!
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 We’re looking for a Data Scientist to join our growing team in Stockholm. In this role, you will:
   

  

* Take the lead in helping our clients understand and measure the true impact of their marketing investment using measurement methods such as Marketing mix modeling (MMM).
* You will collaborate closely with colleagues to transform technical output such as outputs from a model built using Python into clear, actionable insights. Your work will involve packaging and presenting these findings in an engaging and accessible way to inform and inspire C-level stakeholders at some of the largest companies in the Nordics.
* You will contribute to exciting and impactful projects, and be able to work on projects involving attribution modeling, experiments, and algorithm development, while also contributing to the development of automated reporting tools and other innovative data science initiatives.


**Skills And Experience**
 Requirements – Please note that this is an entry-level position (0–2 years of experience), so the competence level of below requirements should align with skills gained through education or limited work experience.
   

  

* Bachelor's/Master’s degree in Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, or similar quantitative field.
* A curious and business-oriented mindset, with a willingness to learn about (or prior knowledge of) the marketing industry.
* Strong storytelling and communication skills, with the ability to explain technical issues and solutions to non-technical audiences.
* Experience with programming (we use Python as our main coding language)
* Experience applying analytical methods such as time series analysis, statistics, marketing mix modeling, or econometrics.
* You are fluent in both English and Swedish.
* You have a valid work permit in Sweden.
* You have excellent skills in Excel and Powerpoint.


**Nice to have**
* Practical experience in a data science, analytics consultant, or similar role.
* Hands-on experience with Marketing Mix Modeling.
* Previous experience of Bayesian statistics.
* Experience with Cloud platforms, SQL, GIT, Power BI, or other relevant technologies.


**Life At WPP Media & Benefits**
 Our passion for shaping the next era of media includes investing in our employees to help them do their best work, and we’re just as committed to employee growth as we are to responsible media investment. WPP Media employees can tap into the global WPP Media & WPP networks to pursue their passions, grow their networks, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising.
   

  

 In Sweden, our benefits include a SEK 3,000 wellness allowance, a 37,5-hour workweek, half-days and “klämdagar" off, 30 days of vacation, and two paid volunteer days per year. WPP Media Sweden is a member of Almega, and all employees are covered by a collective bargaining agreement (kollektivavtal), which ensures occupational pension, insurance, and other negotiated terms. We host regular team activities, knowledge-sharing sessions, and wellness initiatives throughout the year.
   

  

  

  

 WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.
   

  

  

  

 We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach, with teams in the office around four days a week. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.
   

  

**Application**
 This is a full-time permanent position with a start date as soon as possible. We apply a six-month probationary period.
   

  

 In addition to reviewing your CV and conducting interviews, our recruitment process includes a testing phase. Selection and interviews are ongoing, so please submit your application with your CV and cover letter as soon as possible.
   

  

  

  

 We believe that diverse perspectives make us stronger and encourage applications from people of all genders, backgrounds, and experiences.
   

  

**Contact**
 If you have questions about the position, feel free to contact
   

  

 Viktor Åhlen (viktor.ahlen@wppmedia.com) or Martin Söderhäll (martin.soderhall@wppmedia.com). Due to GDPR, we do not accept applications via email.
   

  

 Please read our Privacy Notice for more information on how we process the information you provide.

title: AI & Data Lead Architect
description:
*Vill du påverka och göra skillnad på riktigt? Här bidrar du till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen. Det du gör spelar roll.*
 Din roll
   

  

 Saab söker en AI och Data Lead Architect till vår satsning inom AI och Data. Du arbetar i en strategisk nyckelroll med stort inflytande där du sätter den tekniska riktningen för hur framtidens agentiska AI-system och dataplattformar designas, byggs och skalas i hela organisationen.
   

  

 Du ansvarar för att forma arkitekturen bakom framtidens AI-lösningar, där autonoma och samverkande agenter analyserar, beslutar och agerar i komplexa miljöer. Lösningarna används i allt från Gripen och avancerade sensorsystem till autonoma undervattenssystem och moderna ledningsplattformar.
   

  

 Du arbetar i en miljö med högteknisk komplexitet och säkerhetskrav, där långsiktig hållbarhet, robusthet och skalbarhet är avgörande.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du att
   

  

* definiera den övergripande arkitekturen för AI och data
* leda design av agentiska system och plattformar för multiagent-samverkan
* sätta principer för hur AI, data och system integreras i stor skala
* driva standarder, riktlinjer och tekniska arbetssätt
* leda arkitekturforum och samordna tech leads och team
* fungera som teknisk rådgivare till ledning och produktorganisation
* säkerställa att arkitekturen möjliggör både innovation och säker drift


 Din profil
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har omfattande erfarenhet av arkitektur inom AI, data eller stora distribuerade system och som vill ta ett helhetsansvar för teknisk riktning i en komplex organisation. Du är en tydlig teknisk ledare som skapar förtroende genom kompetens och förmåga att göra komplexa frågor begripliga och beslutbara.
   

  

 Du har erfarenhet av
   

  

* att definiera och implementera arkitektur i stor skala
* AI och ML system i produktionsmiljö
* agentiska system eller avancerade distribuerade arkitekturer
* hur data, modeller och system samverkar i helhetslösningar
* att leda teknisk förändring genom principer och riktlinjer


 Du trivs i en roll där du växlar mellan strategiskt arbete och teknisk fördjupning och där du påverkar både riktning och genomförande.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer
   

  

* civilingenjörsexamen inom datateknik, teknisk fysik, AI eller motsvarande
* mångårig erfarenhet av systemarkitektur och teknisk design
* djup kunskap inom AI, data eller distribuerade system
* erfarenhet av molnplattformar och moderna plattformsteknologier
* erfarenhet av att arbeta med Kubernetes och plattformsarkitektur
* god kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska


 Meriterande
   

  

* erfarenhet av agentiska system och multi agent arkitektur
* erfarenhet av LLM och generativ AI i större system
* Data Mesh eller andra moderna dataarkitekturprinciper
* erfarenhet av säkerhetskritiska eller reglerade miljöer
* erfarenhet av HPC eller GPU baserad infrastruktur


 Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.
   

  

 Vad du blir en del av
   

  

 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med syfte att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidra till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 28 000 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Enterprise Sales Engineer, Sweden
description:
**About Team & About Role**
 Ready for an opportunity to make a substantial impact with a disruptive tech company while building your pre-sales career? Rubrik, Inc. has an amazing product, a supercharged team and the financial backing of Lightspeed Ventures, Greylock Partners and Khosla Ventures. Bottom line, if you have limitless drive and like to win, we want to talk to you!
   

  

 Rubrik is looking for Sales Engineers to provide technical direction and business guidance to the regional sales team. As a Sales Engineer, you will be accountable for regional revenue goals by driving innovative technical programs and overseeing day-to-day account-level activities. You will be responsible for evangelizing, positioning, and architecting Rubrik’s Data Resilience, Observability, and Remediation tools to a targeted list of new & existing customers throughout the UKI region.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Provides technical leadership and direction to customers and internal staff in the development of fully integrated technology solutions in support of pre-sales activities in the assigned market.
* Assists in the analysis, design and development of fully integrated technology solutions.
* Demonstrates technical leadership and subject matter expertise on Rubrik’s products, distributed architectures, file systems, and competitive storage offerings in the SAN product space.
* Acts as technical expert and consultant to develop and propose solutions that meet the technology and business requirements of assigned customers.
* Makes technical and sales presentations to customer's technical staff and senior management.
* Serves as a trusted technology advisor to customers and serves as an internal resource on technical issues or specific business applications within an assigned market segment.
* Successfully builds relationships with the account team, partners and customers in support of sales team objectives and engages and leverages corporate resources, abilities, budgets and personnel as appropriate.
* Leads technical sales calls
* Qualifies sales opportunities in the terms of customer technical requirements, competition, decision making process and funding.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5-10 years of sales engineering experience preferably in a software or data center environment.
* Driven – need for success, highly energetic with a strong hands-on, “can do” approach.
* The successful candidate must have a fundamental breadth of technical knowledge in cloud data management, backup and disaster recovery and data analytics.
* Entrepreneurial - willing to go the extra mile, strong work ethic, resourceful, “get it done” attitude
* Strives in moving in a fast-paced environment; including handling multiple calls/demos per day with immediate follow up.
* A high level of business acumen and experience working with Cx0 level personnel, bringing technology solutions to solve business challenges.
* Smart, adaptable and open-minded


 Join Us in Securing and Accelerating the World's AI Transformation
   

  

 Rubrik (RBRK), the Security and AI Operations Company, leads at the intersection of data protection, cyber resilience, and enterprise AI acceleration. Rubrik Security Cloud delivers complete cyber resilience by securing, monitoring, and recovering data, identities, and workloads across clouds. Rubrik Agent Cloud accelerates trusted AI agent deployments at scale by monitoring and auditing agentic actions, enforcing real-time guardrails, fine-tuning for accuracy and undoing agentic mistakes.
   

  

 Linkedin | X (formerly Twitter) | Instagram | Rubrik.com
   

  

 Inclusion @ Rubrik
   

  

 At Rubrik, we are dedicated to fostering a culture where people from all backgrounds are valued, feel they belong, and believe they can succeed. Our commitment to inclusion is at the heart of our mission to secure the world’s data.
   

  

 Our goal is to hire and promote the best talent, regardless of background. We continually review our hiring practices to ensure fairness and strive to create an environment where every employee has equal access to opportunities for growth and excellence. We believe in empowering everyone to bring their authentic selves to work and achieve their fullest potential.
   

  

 Our inclusion strategy focuses on three core areas of our business and culture:
   

  

* Our Company: We are committed to building a merit-based organization that offers equal access to growth and success for all employees globally. Your potential is limitless here.
* Our Culture: We strive to create an inclusive atmosphere where individuals from all backgrounds feel a strong sense of belonging, can thrive, and do their best work. Your contributions help us innovate and break boundaries.
* Our Communities: We are dedicated to expanding our engagement with the communities we operate in, creating opportunities for underrepresented talent and driving greater innovation for our clients. Your impact extends beyond Rubrik, contributing to safer and stronger communities.


 Equal Opportunity Employer/Veterans/Disabled
   

  

 Rubrik is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, or protected veteran status and will not be discriminated against on the basis of disability.
   

  

 Rubrik provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability or genetics. In addition to federal law requirements, Rubrik complies with applicable state and local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment in every location in which the company has facilities. This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training.
   

  

 Federal law requires employers to provide reasonable accommodation to qualified individuals with disabilities. Please contact us at hr@rubrik.com if you require a reasonable accommodation to apply for a job or to perform your job. Examples of reasonable accommodation include making a change to the application process or work procedures, providing documents in an alternate format, using a sign language interpreter, or using specialized equipment.
   

  

 EEO IS THE LAW
   

  

 NOTIFICATION OF EMPLOYEE RIGHTS UNDER FEDERAL LABOR LAWS

title: Cybersecurity Consultant
description:
**What does it mean to be a Cybersecurity Consultant at Netlight?** 




 It will vary a lot between Netlighters as we, around the right person, will design a role together with you. You will be starting somewhere familiar with your experience, and from there it is your call how your career at Netlight will look, ranging from which clients you will work with, what role you want to take (based on your personal experience, strengths, your personal interest) and how your relationship with your mentor/coach/EDGE networks/social networks will look like.
 



  





 You will build the products, systems and technical solutions of today and tomorrow. This means that our consultants get the opportunity to help build and scale existing and new products and companies and also continuously learn and master a variety of technical tools. At Netlight, we will challenge you. Our clients will challenge you. You will challenge our clients. You will challenge us. We will grow together and unleash the potential in each other.
 



  





 Specifically as a Cybersecurity Consultant, you will collaborate with other Netlighters and clients in Stockholm and across offices. It can be working as Security Engineer, Information Security Engineer, Security Architect, Security Analyst, Solution Engineering, Site Reliability Engineer, DevSecOps Engineer, Security Lead, Security Manager, Security Officer, Secure Cloud Architect, it can be working in a backend role building a secure system, it can be working as part of a security advisory team, Project Manager of building a secure system, or being part of a Technical Due Diligence project bringing the security perspectives, to give some examples. In parallel to this, you will be an important part of improving our Cybersecurity work and being an important part of our passionate Cybersecurity community at Netlight.
 



  





**Minimum Qualifications** 



* Master Degree in Engineering or Technology
* Verbal and written fluency in English is required, and meriting with Swedish/Danish/Norwegian
* 0,5-5 years of work experience with Cybersecurity, Information Security or building secure systems
* International mindset, as you will collaborate with Netlighters and clients across offices.



  





**Application** 




 We are always looking for new Netlighters, so feel free to apply if you meet the qualifications. We try to get in touch within two weeks
 
 if
 
 we find that your profile and experiences are a match beyond the qualifications at this time.
 



  





**About us** 




 Netlight provides a full range of premium IT-consulting services at the forefront of the digital industry and stands out for its product- and technology-independent expertise in a wide range of industries and clients. We are a network organization of more than 2 000 role models making aspiring digital leaders successful in their business-critical IT projects. Netlight has been awarded several times as top employer, as well as for growth, continued profitability and engagement for diversity, equity and equality within the IT industry. Today we are growing all across Europe, currently with more than 13 active international offices.
 



  





**Come work with us** 




 Netlight strives to be a truly diverse, equitable and inclusive organization. Regardless of who you are, what personality, background, and experience you have, you enrich our culture through your values. Netlight’s purpose is to unleash full potential, realize great careers, and fulfill personal growth. To achieve this, we have a highly engaged network organization, where every employee gets a mentor, delivery coach and personal communities. The key to our continued success is trust and personal responsibility, diverse experiences, challenging opportunities and developing from personal values. Every Netlighter is an active part of building and shaping this culture, which leads to a clear correlation between personal growth and the growth of Netlight.

title: Marketing Engineer (SEO, AEO & CRO)
description:
At Precis, we are a group of friendly experts in media buying, analytics & marketing science, creative and technology with a joint mission to help great companies thrive in the digital landscape.
   

  

 Are you curious to learn more about us? Read more about us here. For insights into what life is like at Precis and a peek at the perks of working with us, visit this page. In our Handbook, you can get a neat summary of who we are, our culture and our offices.
 **In** 
**this document** 
**, we have summarised what our recruitment process looks like. Take a look!**
*We are committed to building an inclusive and fair workplace that attracts talent and advances its people, regardless of their background, experiences or perspectives. We believe that a diverse set of minds will continue to contribute to our innovative culture and our ability to reinvent ourselves constantly.*
**About The Role 💡**
 The Marketing Engineer role is a senior individual contributor who leads innovation for our SEO, AEO, and CRO strategies. In this role, you will use AI native tools to turn experimental ideas into automated, execution ready workflows that deliver consistent, scalable results for our clients. Sitting at the intersection of marketing strategy and technical execution, you will design complex systems, such as autonomous agents and wrap them in simple, user-friendly interfaces. By leveraging GitHub for version control and integrating with Google Cloud Service integrations & APIs, you will collaborate closely with our strategists, specialists, and technical team to replace manual tasks with automated efficiency.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing 💼**
* Lead the Development Roadmap: Own the technical product roadmap, ruthlessly prioritising team and client ideas based on the highest commercial ROI. You will drive advanced marketing automation projects by designing backend data pipelines and multi-node agent frameworks, packaging them into simple, user-friendly interfaces that eliminate manual data crunching.
* Deploy Automated Workflows: Use AI native tools like Claude Code, Cursor, and Google AI Studio to turn experimental operational ideas into stable, automated workflows, while managing version control in GitHub and connecting solutions directly via Google Cloud integrations & APIs.
* Track Shifts & Updates: Monitor industry news and updates to Google search algorithms and LLM behaviours to quickly adapt internal processes, keeping our strategies ahead of the curve so our clients win within search.
* Drive Commercial Impact: Act as the senior technical lead on key accounts and play an active role in sales calls and client presentations to market our advanced technical capabilities. You will mentor mid-level specialists and foster a collaborative team culture while demonstrating directly to stakeholders how our automated workflows eliminate manual work and add real value.


**WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR** 
 ✔️
   

  

* AI Assisted Development & Tooling: Proficient at leveraging AI native development environments and agents, including Google AI Studio, Cursor, Claude Code, and MCPs, alongside industry platforms like Profound, Peec, Ahrefs, and Screaming Frog to rapidly build and iterate marketing workflows.
* Cloud, Data, & API Integration: Highly competent in working with web APIs, specifically Google APIs and SERP scraping providers, managing collaborative repositories in GitHub, and safely deploying secure solutions using Google Cloud integrations with support from our technical team.
* Systems Architecture & Autonomous Delivery: Deep experience connecting strategic marketing with technical execution by designing, testing, and maintaining stable, automated systems and data workflows that run seamlessly with minimal supervision.
* Commercial Awareness & Prioritisation: A strong business mindset with the ability to ruthlessly prioritise operational efficiency, stability, and clear business value over experimental novelty.
* Technical Communication: A skilled advisor who can effortlessly translate complex processes or algorithmic shifts into plain, high-impact actions for internal stakeholders and clients.


**WHAT WE OFFER🌟**
*You can read our full offering in our* 
*handbook* 
*.*
* Transparent salary setting - you can find it in our handbook linked above. This is a level 4 role within the "Media, Client & SEO/CRO" column. Make sure you're looking at the correct office (where you're based or planning to relocate).
* An intense learning environment where you will be able to grow and develop your skills and passions alongside some of the brightest minds in the industry.
* A culture that is built on collaboration, trust and innovation. We value having fun together - that’s why we also have regular afterworks, team events and a yearly festival.
* 30 days paid leave, flexible public holidays, parental pay, a solid pension scheme and key insurance. Our different offices also offer different perks such as massage, health care contributions, free book orders, healthy snacks & great coffee, EAP programs and your choice of PC or Mac (this might change slightly depending on the office).
* A diverse environment with a high focus on inclusion and belonging. We speak 46 native languages around Precis, and our internal inclusion score is 4.5 out of 5.


 🇬🇧 To make things as smooth as possible, please ensure your CV is in English.
   

  

**We update all candidates on their applications by email. If you don't receive an email from us, please check your spam folder.**

title: Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Make it real with Cloud Infrastructure Services (CIS) at Capgemini.**
 At CIS, we enable organizations to transform and thrive in a digital-first world. Our teams deliver end-to-end solutions across cloud, cybersecurity, automation, and user experience – helping clients modernize their infrastructure and unlock innovation at scale.
   

  

**Your role**
 We are looking for an experienced
 **Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead** 
 who will play a key role in large-scale enterprise transformation and cloud migration initiatives. This role is critical in shaping successful migration programs by creating clarity, structure, and direction at the very start of the journey.
   

  

 As Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead, you will be responsible for understanding complex enterprise IT landscapes, translating data into insights, and turning those insights into clear, executable migration roadmaps that align technology with business goals.
   

  

**You will:**
* Lead discovery and assessment activities for large enterprise environments, covering applications, infrastructure, platforms, and dependencies
* Collect, structure, and analyze large volumes of data from multiple sources such as CMDBs, discovery tools, workshops, and interviews
* Assess on premises and cloud environments and define target-state migration strategies
* Design and present migration roadmaps, including migration waves, dependencies, risks, recommended migration approaches, and associated cost and TCO considerations
* Translate technical findings into clear, decision-ready proposals, including TCO analysis and migration business cases, for architects, IT leadership, and business stakeholders
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients, helping them understand what to migrate, how to migrate, and in which order
* Collaborate with architects, engineers, and business representatives to ensure alignment between technical feasibility, financial viability, and business priorities


**Your profile**
 We are looking for someone who combines strong analytical skills, broad technical knowledge, and excellent communication abilities.
   

  

**You also have:**
* Proven experience leading discovery and assessment phases in enterprise migration projects
* Strong background in on premises infrastructure (data centers, servers, networks, storage, virtualization, operating systems)
* Solid experience with public cloud platforms (Azure, AWS and/or GCP) and cloud migration concepts
* Hands-on experience with one or more migration and discovery tools, such as Azure Migrate, AWS Application Discovery Service, AWS Application Migration Service (MGN), Cast Highlight, Cast Imaging, Cloudamize, and Txture
* Ability to work with complex data sets and transform them into structured insights and actionable recommendations
* Full working proficiency in both Swedish and English


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* A challenging career in a vibrant environment with access to extensive training, a global network of experts, and an innovative culture that promotes learning, growth, and shared success
* Work on large, business-critical transformation programs, helping organizations modernize their IT landscapes and move confidently toward the future
* A company culture driven by core values: Honesty, Trust, Freedom, Team Spirit, Modesty, Fun, and Boldness
* A strong commitment to inclusion, diversity, and supporting the whole person


**Ready to make it real? Explore opportunities with CIS and shape the future of digital infrastructure.**
*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real | www.capgemini.com

title: Analyst - 18181 (Swedish fluency required)
description:
We are looking for a Senior Business Analyst with strong technical understanding to join a global organization in Stockholm. This role sits at the intersection of business and IT, focusing on solution analysis, system design discussions, and bridging business needs with technical implementation.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Drive and facilitate requirements and solution analysis activities
* Collaborate closely with architects, developers, and business stakeholders to define effective IT solutions
* Analyze integrations, data flows, and system dependencies across complex environments
* Translate business requirements into technically feasible solutions
* Support solution delivery in a global, multi-team environment
* Act as a key liaison between teams across Sweden and China



  





**Required Qualifications** 



* Several years of experience as a Business Analyst, System Analyst, or similar role
* Strong understanding of system architecture, integrations, data flows, and cloud-based solutions
* Solution-oriented mindset with the ability to shape and evaluate technical solutions
* Experience working closely with development teams in Agile environments
* Experience navigating complex system landscapes and enterprise environments
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience working in large global organizations
* Experience leading, mentoring, or coordinating Business Analysts

title: Domänarkitekt
description:
*Vill du vara med och forma framtidens utvecklarupplevelse? Hos oss får du chansen att bygga hjärtat i vår digitala transformation – plattformar och verktyg som driver innovation, säkerhet och användarvänlighet. Som domänarkitekt agerar du också i rollen som tågarkitekt och blir en central kraft i att skapa en världsledande utvecklingsmiljö där DevSecOps och molntransformation står i fokus. Tillsammans med engagerade kollegor bygger du grunden för nästa generations digitala tjänster. Är du redo att ta ledartröjan och inspirera till innovation och kvalitet?*
**Om jobbet**
 Som domänarkitekt är du en nyckelperson både i linjeorganisationen, där du ansvarar för arkitekturen inom domänen Process & Dev Tool, och i tågledningen, där du främst arbetar på taktisk nivå i nära samarbete med såväl strategisk som operativ nivå. Inom Process & Dev Tools möjliggör vi systemutveckling i världsklass och lägger grunden för effektiva, säkra och skalbara lösningar genom att etablera principer, plattformar, processer och arbetssätt som skapar en modern och hållbar utvecklingsmiljö.
   

  

 Du ansvarar för att definiera och kommunicera en gemensam teknisk och arkitekturell vision för tåget och säkerställer att de system som används och utvecklas passar för sitt syfte och stödjer vår övergripande strategi. Du leder och utvecklar tågets arkitekturella runway, bidrar till planering och prioritering och coachar teamen för att säkerställa att lösningarna håller hög kvalitet och följer den arkitekturella visionen. Du samarbetar med Product Manager, RTE, Business Owners, team, arkitekter och andra intressenter för att säkerställa att våra mål och planer är väl förankrade och att vi håller jämn takt med teknisk skuld. Du är både rådgivare och inspiratör, och driver det tekniska arbetet framåt med moderna metoder och ett DevSecOps-mindset.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Ansvara för att utveckla och kommunicera den tekniska och arkitekturella visionen för tåget
* Säkerställa att arkitekturella behov och möjliggörare (enablers) hanteras i backloggen
* Samverka med tågledningen och relevanta intressenter för att planera, prioritera och koordinera tekniska lösningar
* Bidra till att lösningar håller hög kvalitet och är i linje med verksamhetens mål och strategier
* Coacha utvecklingsteam och främja ett ständigt lärande kring arkitektur och kvalitet
* Tillsammans med resterande tågledning styra tåget för att utveckla rätt lösning utifrån en helhetssyn med utgångspunkt i omvärldens och kundernas framtida behov
* Säkerställa kravställning gentemot leverantör
* Utforma och förvalta "Golden Path" för utveckling och leverans på plattformen, inklusive automatiserade säkerhetskontroller, policy enforcement och audit trails
* Driva kontinuerlig förbättring av plattformens säkerhets- och compliancefunktioner, samt utbilda och stötta utvecklingsteamen i bästa praxis
* Ta en ledarroll i det tekniska arbetet och inspirera till innovation och kvalitet
* Kommunicera och förklara komplexa tekniska frågor på ett pedagogiskt och lättförståeligt sätt för olika målgrupper, samt agera mentor och coach för teamen


 Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:
   

  

* Akademisk utbildning inom datateknik, systemvetenskap, IT eller liknande
* Djup och bred teknisk erfarenhet av systemutveckling och DevSecOps, gärna i större organisationer
* Erfarenhet av att implementera CI/CD och automatiserade pipelines
* Stark förståelse för DevSecOps, automatisering samt security och compliance by design
* Erfarenhet av att implementera och övervaka säkerhets- och compliancekrav i moln- och containerplattformar
* God kunskap om säkerhetsverktyg (t.ex. SAST, DAST, secrets management, IAM) och compliance-ramverk, gärna inom bank och finans
* Kunskap om API-strategier och integrationsmönster
* Förmåga att dokumentera och hålla arkitektur och mönster uppdaterade
* Agilt mindset och erfarenhet av att arbeta enligt SAFe eller liknande ramverk
* Mycket god samarbetsförmåga, lyhördhet och ödmjukhet – du övertygar med väl underbyggda argument och söker alltid den bästa lösningen för helheten
* Förmåga att kommunicera och samarbeta med både tekniska och icke-tekniska intressenter
* Starkt ledarskap och förmåga att motivera, engagera och utveckla andra
* Pedagogisk skicklighet – du kan förklara komplexa tekniska frågor på ett enkelt och tydligt sätt för både tekniska och icke-tekniska intressenter
* Svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


 Meriterande är även om du har:
   

  

* Kunskap inom Azure- och OpenShift/Kubernetes-arkitektur
* Erfarenhet av nätverk, monitorering, logg- och eventhantering
* Kunskap om Key Management, certifikat, autentisering, auktorisering och IAM
* Erfarenhet av IDP-lösningar


 Som person är du nyfiken, drivande och har ett stort engagemang för teknik och utveckling. Du har lätt för att samarbeta och trivs med att arbeta i team, samtidigt som du gärna tar initiativ och leder andra framåt. Du är kommunikativ, pedagogisk och har förmågan att inspirera både tekniska och icke-tekniska kollegor. Du har ett agilt och lösningsorienterat förhållningssätt, är prestigelös och ser alltid till helheten. Din analytiska förmåga och ditt strukturerade arbetssätt gör att du kan hantera komplexa frågor och fatta välgrundade beslut.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef:Charlotta.Haldin@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena:Jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen:Lisa-Maria.Carensjo@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Digital & IT är hjärtat i Länsförsäkringsgruppens digitala utveckling. Vi driver den gemensamma digitala transformationen och levererar förstklassiga IT-lösningar, datadrivna insikter och innovativa digitala tjänster som skapar värde för hela verksamheten. Vårt uppdrag är att bygga en robust och framtidssäker IT-miljö – både på plats och i molnet – som möjliggör kundnära och effektiva affärer i hela gruppen.
   

  

 Hos oss möts teknik, affär och innovation. Vi arbetar tvärfunktionellt ute i verksamheten i agila team där utveckling, drift och strategi går hand i hand. Vi ansvarar för allt från IT-styrning, enterprisearkitektur och leverantörshantering till applikationsutveckling, cybersäkerhet och verksamhetsberedskap.

title: Red Hat OpenShift Architect
description:
**Role: RedHat OpenShift Engineer** 




**Location: Kista, Stockholm, Sweden** 




**Contract for 6 months** 




**Onsite** 




  





  





  





  

  

  

 Job description for a Red Hat OpenShift Archit
 



  





 ect
   

 This is a job description for a Red Hat OpenShift Architect with proven experience migrating workloads from VMware (vSphere/onprem VMs) to Red Hat OpenShift (Kubernetes). The role focuses on solution architecture, migration planning and execution, platform automation, and ensuring secure, scalable, and highly available OpenShift-based platfo
 



 rms.Role Over
 



 view• Lead architecture, design, and implementation of enterprise OpenShift platfo
 



 rms.• Execute migration strategies for moving applications and data from VMware virtual machines and traditional architectures to containerized OpenShift environme
 



 nts.• Work with cross-functional teams (Dev, Security, Networking, Storage) to deliver migration projects with minimal disruption and measurable business va
 



 lue.Key Responsibili
 



 ties• Experience in end-to-end OpenShift platform architectures (high-availability, multi-AZ, multi-cluster, hybrid clo
 



 ud).• Create migration strategies (lift-and-shift, replatform, refactor) for VMware-hosted workloads to OpenShift, including phased migration plans and cutover/rollback procedu
 



 res.• Lead proofs-of-concept (PoCs), pilot migrations, and production migrations; validate performance, resilience, and security post-migrat
 



 ion.• Build automation for platform provisioning and day 2 operations using Infrastructure as Code (Ansible, Terraform, OpenShift Ansible/Installer, Operato
 



 rs).• Define networking, storage, and security models for OpenShift (CNI selection, persistent storage via CSI, RBAC, network policies, service mesh consideratio
 



 ns).• Integrate CI/CD and GitOps pipelines (e.g., Jenkins/GitLab/ArgoCD) for automated app delivery to OpenSh
 



 ift.• Establish observability and logging (Prometheus, Grafana, EFK/OLM) and implement backup/restore strategies (Velero or equivale
 



 nt).• Collaborate with VMware/vSphere teams to assess virtualization inventories, dependencies, and create migration timeli
 



 nes.• Produce architecture artifacts: diagrams, runbooks, migration playbooks, capacity and cost estimates, and operational runbooks for SRE te
 



 ams.• Mentor engineering teams on containerization best practices, operator patterns, and cloud-native application des
 



 ign.• Ensure compliance with security, governance, and regulatory requirements during and after migrat
 



 ion.Required Qualifications & Experi
 



 ence• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experie
 



 nce.• 8+ years in enterprise infrastructure/cloud roles, with at least 3–5 years specifically designing and operating Red Hat OpenShift or Kubernetes platfo
 



 rms.• Hands-on experience migrating applications and services from VMware/vSphere (on-prem) to OpenShift/Kuberne
 



 tes.• Strong knowledge of VMware stack: vSphere, vCenter, and familiarity with virtualization concepts, VM inventories, and dependency mapp
 



 ing.• Expertise in OpenShift installation and configuration (IPI/UPI), cluster lifecycle, and operator mo
 



 del.• Proficiency with Infrastructure-as-Code and automation tools (Terraform, Ansible, OpenShift CLI/
